19 using namespace clang;
20 using namespace clang::interp;
21 
22 using APSInt = llvm::APSInt;

24 namespace clang {
25 namespace interp {
26 
27 /// Scope used to handle temporaries in toplevel variable declarations.
28 template <class Emitter> class DeclScope final : public LocalScope<Emitter> {
29 public:
30  DeclScope(Compiler<Emitter> *Ctx, const ValueDecl *VD)
31  : LocalScope<Emitter>(Ctx, VD), Scope(Ctx->P, VD),
32  OldGlobalDecl(Ctx->GlobalDecl),
33  OldInitializingDecl(Ctx->InitializingDecl) {
34  Ctx->GlobalDecl = Context::shouldBeGloballyIndexed(VD);
35  Ctx->InitializingDecl = VD;
36  Ctx->InitStack.push_back(InitLink::Decl(VD));
37  }
38 
39  void addExtended(const Scope::Local &Local) override {
40  return this->addLocal(Local);
41  }
42 
43  ~DeclScope() {
44  this->Ctx->GlobalDecl = OldGlobalDecl;
45  this->Ctx->InitializingDecl = OldInitializingDecl;
46  this->Ctx->InitStack.pop_back();
47  }
48 
49 private:
50  Program::DeclScope Scope;
51  bool OldGlobalDecl;
52  const ValueDecl *OldInitializingDecl;
53 };
54 
55 /// Scope used to handle initialization methods.
56 template <class Emitter> class OptionScope final {
57 public:
58  /// Root constructor, compiling or discarding primitives.
59  OptionScope(Compiler<Emitter> *Ctx, bool NewDiscardResult,
60  bool NewInitializing)
61  : Ctx(Ctx), OldDiscardResult(Ctx->DiscardResult),
62  OldInitializing(Ctx->Initializing) {
63  Ctx->DiscardResult = NewDiscardResult;
64  Ctx->Initializing = NewInitializing;
65  }
66 
67  ~OptionScope() {
68  Ctx->DiscardResult = OldDiscardResult;
69  Ctx->Initializing = OldInitializing;
70  }
71 
72 private:
73  /// Parent context.
74  Compiler<Emitter> *Ctx;
75  /// Old discard flag to restore.
76  bool OldDiscardResult;
77  bool OldInitializing;
78 };
79 
80 template <class Emitter>
81 bool InitLink::emit(Compiler<Emitter> *Ctx, const Expr *E) const {
82  switch (Kind) {
83  case K_This:
84  return Ctx->emitThis(E);
85  case K_Field:
86  // We're assuming there's a base pointer on the stack already.
87  return Ctx->emitGetPtrFieldPop(Offset, E);
88  case K_Temp:
89  return Ctx->emitGetPtrLocal(Offset, E);
90  case K_Decl:
91  return Ctx->visitDeclRef(D, E);
92  default:
93  llvm_unreachable("Unhandled InitLink kind");
94  }
95  return true;
96 }
97 
98 /// Scope managing label targets.
99 template <class Emitter> class LabelScope {
100 public:
101  virtual ~LabelScope() {}
102 
103 protected:
104  LabelScope(Compiler<Emitter> *Ctx) : Ctx(Ctx) {}
105  /// Compiler instance.
106  Compiler<Emitter> *Ctx;
107 };
108 
109 /// Sets the context for break/continue statements.
110 template <class Emitter> class LoopScope final : public LabelScope<Emitter> {
111 public:
112  using LabelTy = typename Compiler<Emitter>::LabelTy;
113  using OptLabelTy = typename Compiler<Emitter>::OptLabelTy;
114 
115  LoopScope(Compiler<Emitter> *Ctx, LabelTy BreakLabel, LabelTy ContinueLabel)
116  : LabelScope<Emitter>(Ctx), OldBreakLabel(Ctx->BreakLabel),
117  OldContinueLabel(Ctx->ContinueLabel) {
118  this->Ctx->BreakLabel = BreakLabel;
119  this->Ctx->ContinueLabel = ContinueLabel;
120  }
121 
122  ~LoopScope() {
123  this->Ctx->BreakLabel = OldBreakLabel;
124  this->Ctx->ContinueLabel = OldContinueLabel;
125  }
126 
127 private:
128  OptLabelTy OldBreakLabel;
129  OptLabelTy OldContinueLabel;
130 };
131 
132 // Sets the context for a switch scope, mapping labels.
133 template <class Emitter> class SwitchScope final : public LabelScope<Emitter> {
134 public:
135  using LabelTy = typename Compiler<Emitter>::LabelTy;
136  using OptLabelTy = typename Compiler<Emitter>::OptLabelTy;
137  using CaseMap = typename Compiler<Emitter>::CaseMap;
138 
139  SwitchScope(Compiler<Emitter> *Ctx, CaseMap &&CaseLabels, LabelTy BreakLabel,
140  OptLabelTy DefaultLabel)
141  : LabelScope<Emitter>(Ctx), OldBreakLabel(Ctx->BreakLabel),
142  OldDefaultLabel(this->Ctx->DefaultLabel),
143  OldCaseLabels(std::move(this->Ctx->CaseLabels)) {
144  this->Ctx->BreakLabel = BreakLabel;
145  this->Ctx->DefaultLabel = DefaultLabel;
146  this->Ctx->CaseLabels = std::move(CaseLabels);
147  }
148 
149  ~SwitchScope() {
150  this->Ctx->BreakLabel = OldBreakLabel;
151  this->Ctx->DefaultLabel = OldDefaultLabel;
152  this->Ctx->CaseLabels = std::move(OldCaseLabels);
153  }
154 
155 private:
156  OptLabelTy OldBreakLabel;
157  OptLabelTy OldDefaultLabel;
158  CaseMap OldCaseLabels;
159 };
160 
161 template <class Emitter> class StmtExprScope final {
162 public:
163  StmtExprScope(Compiler<Emitter> *Ctx) : Ctx(Ctx), OldFlag(Ctx->InStmtExpr) {
164  Ctx->InStmtExpr = true;
165  }
166 
167  ~StmtExprScope() { Ctx->InStmtExpr = OldFlag; }
168 
169 private:
170  Compiler<Emitter> *Ctx;
171  bool OldFlag;
172 };
173 
174 } // namespace interp
175 } // namespace clang
176 
177 template <class Emitter>
178 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCastExpr(const CastExpr *CE) {
179  const Expr *SubExpr = CE->getSubExpr();
180  switch (CE->getCastKind()) {
181 
182  case CK_LValueToRValue: {
183  if (DiscardResult)
184  return this->discard(SubExpr);
185 
186  std::optional<PrimType> SubExprT = classify(SubExpr->getType());
187  // Prepare storage for the result.
188  if (!Initializing && !SubExprT) {
189  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(SubExpr);
190  if (!LocalIndex)
191  return false;
192  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, CE))
193  return false;
194  }
195 
196  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
197  return false;
198 
199  if (SubExprT)
200  return this->emitLoadPop(*SubExprT, CE);
201 
202  // If the subexpr type is not primitive, we need to perform a copy here.
203  // This happens for example in C when dereferencing a pointer of struct
204  // type.
205  return this->emitMemcpy(CE);
206  }
207 
208  case CK_DerivedToBaseMemberPointer: {
209  assert(classifyPrim(CE->getType()) == PT_MemberPtr);
210  assert(classifyPrim(SubExpr->getType()) == PT_MemberPtr);
211  const auto *FromMP = SubExpr->getType()->getAs<MemberPointerType>();
212  const auto *ToMP = CE->getType()->getAs<MemberPointerType>();
213 
214  unsigned DerivedOffset = collectBaseOffset(QualType(ToMP->getClass(), 0),
215  QualType(FromMP->getClass(), 0));
216 
217  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
218  return false;
219 
220  return this->emitGetMemberPtrBasePop(DerivedOffset, CE);
221  }
222 
223  case CK_BaseToDerivedMemberPointer: {
224  assert(classifyPrim(CE) == PT_MemberPtr);
225  assert(classifyPrim(SubExpr) == PT_MemberPtr);
226  const auto *FromMP = SubExpr->getType()->getAs<MemberPointerType>();
227  const auto *ToMP = CE->getType()->getAs<MemberPointerType>();
228 
229  unsigned DerivedOffset = collectBaseOffset(QualType(FromMP->getClass(), 0),
230  QualType(ToMP->getClass(), 0));
231 
232  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
233  return false;
234  return this->emitGetMemberPtrBasePop(-DerivedOffset, CE);
235  }
236 
237  case CK_UncheckedDerivedToBase:
238  case CK_DerivedToBase: {
239  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
240  return false;
241 
242  const auto extractRecordDecl = [](QualType Ty) -> const CXXRecordDecl * {
243  if (const auto *PT = dyn_cast<PointerType>(Ty))
244  return PT->getPointeeType()->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
245  return Ty->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
246  };
247 
248  // FIXME: We can express a series of non-virtual casts as a single
249  // GetPtrBasePop op.
250  QualType CurType = SubExpr->getType();
251  for (const CXXBaseSpecifier *B : CE->path()) {
252  if (B->isVirtual()) {
253  if (!this->emitGetPtrVirtBasePop(extractRecordDecl(B->getType()), CE))
254  return false;
255  CurType = B->getType();
256  } else {
257  unsigned DerivedOffset = collectBaseOffset(B->getType(), CurType);
258  if (!this->emitGetPtrBasePop(DerivedOffset, CE))
259  return false;
260  CurType = B->getType();
261  }
262  }
263 
264  return true;
265  }
266 
267  case CK_BaseToDerived: {
268  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
269  return false;
270 
271  unsigned DerivedOffset =
272  collectBaseOffset(SubExpr->getType(), CE->getType());
273 
274  return this->emitGetPtrDerivedPop(DerivedOffset, CE);
275  }
276 
277  case CK_FloatingCast: {
278  // HLSL uses CK_FloatingCast to cast between vectors.
279  if (!SubExpr->getType()->isFloatingType() ||
280  !CE->getType()->isFloatingType())
281  return false;
282  if (DiscardResult)
283  return this->discard(SubExpr);
284  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
285  return false;
286  const auto *TargetSemantics = &Ctx.getFloatSemantics(CE->getType());
287  return this->emitCastFP(TargetSemantics, getRoundingMode(CE), CE);
288  }
289 
290  case CK_IntegralToFloating: {
291  if (DiscardResult)
292  return this->discard(SubExpr);
293  std::optional<PrimType> FromT = classify(SubExpr->getType());
294  if (!FromT)
295  return false;
296 
297  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
298  return false;
299 
300  const auto *TargetSemantics = &Ctx.getFloatSemantics(CE->getType());
301  llvm::RoundingMode RM = getRoundingMode(CE);
302  return this->emitCastIntegralFloating(*FromT, TargetSemantics, RM, CE);
303  }
304 
305  case CK_FloatingToBoolean:
306  case CK_FloatingToIntegral: {
307  if (DiscardResult)
308  return this->discard(SubExpr);
309 
310  std::optional<PrimType> ToT = classify(CE->getType());
311 
312  if (!ToT)
313  return false;
314 
315  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
316  return false;
317 
318  if (ToT == PT_IntAP)
319  return this->emitCastFloatingIntegralAP(Ctx.getBitWidth(CE->getType()),
320  CE);
321  if (ToT == PT_IntAPS)
322  return this->emitCastFloatingIntegralAPS(Ctx.getBitWidth(CE->getType()),
323  CE);
324 
325  return this->emitCastFloatingIntegral(*ToT, CE);
326  }
327 
328  case CK_NullToPointer:
329  case CK_NullToMemberPointer: {
330  if (DiscardResult)
331  return true;
332 
333  const Descriptor *Desc = nullptr;
334  const QualType PointeeType = CE->getType()->getPointeeType();
335  if (!PointeeType.isNull()) {
336  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(PointeeType))
337  Desc = P.createDescriptor(SubExpr, *T);
338  }
339  return this->emitNull(classifyPrim(CE->getType()), Desc, CE);
340  }
341 
342  case CK_PointerToIntegral: {
343  if (DiscardResult)
344  return this->discard(SubExpr);
345 
346  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
347  return false;
348 
349  // If SubExpr doesn't result in a pointer, make it one.
350  if (PrimType FromT = classifyPrim(SubExpr->getType()); FromT != PT_Ptr) {
351  assert(isPtrType(FromT));
352  if (!this->emitDecayPtr(FromT, PT_Ptr, CE))
353  return false;
354  }
355 
356  PrimType T = classifyPrim(CE->getType());
357  if (T == PT_IntAP)
358  return this->emitCastPointerIntegralAP(Ctx.getBitWidth(CE->getType()),
359  CE);
360  if (T == PT_IntAPS)
361  return this->emitCastPointerIntegralAPS(Ctx.getBitWidth(CE->getType()),
362  CE);
363  return this->emitCastPointerIntegral(T, CE);
364  }
365 
366  case CK_ArrayToPointerDecay: {
367  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
368  return false;
369  if (!this->emitArrayDecay(CE))
370  return false;
371  if (DiscardResult)
372  return this->emitPopPtr(CE);
373  return true;
374  }
375 
376  case CK_IntegralToPointer: {
377  QualType IntType = SubExpr->getType();
378  assert(IntType->isIntegralOrEnumerationType());
379  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
380  return false;
381  // FIXME: I think the discard is wrong since the int->ptr cast might cause a
382  // diagnostic.
383  PrimType T = classifyPrim(IntType);
384  if (DiscardResult)
385  return this->emitPop(T, CE);
386 
387  QualType PtrType = CE->getType();
388  assert(PtrType->isPointerType());
389 
390  const Descriptor *Desc;
391  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(PtrType->getPointeeType()))
392  Desc = P.createDescriptor(SubExpr, *T);
393  else if (PtrType->getPointeeType()->isVoidType())
394  Desc = nullptr;
395  else
396  Desc = P.createDescriptor(CE, PtrType->getPointeeType().getTypePtr(),
397  Descriptor::InlineDescMD, true, false,
398  /*IsMutable=*/false, nullptr);
399 
400  if (!this->emitGetIntPtr(T, Desc, CE))
401  return false;
402 
403  PrimType DestPtrT = classifyPrim(PtrType);
404  if (DestPtrT == PT_Ptr)
405  return true;
406 
407  // In case we're converting the integer to a non-Pointer.
408  return this->emitDecayPtr(PT_Ptr, DestPtrT, CE);
409  }
410 
411  case CK_AtomicToNonAtomic:
412  case CK_ConstructorConversion:
413  case CK_FunctionToPointerDecay:
414  case CK_NonAtomicToAtomic:
415  case CK_NoOp:
416  case CK_UserDefinedConversion:
417  case CK_AddressSpaceConversion:
418  return this->delegate(SubExpr);
419 
420  case CK_BitCast: {
421  // Reject bitcasts to atomic types.
422  if (CE->getType()->isAtomicType()) {
423  if (!this->discard(SubExpr))
424  return false;
425  return this->emitInvalidCast(CastKind::Reinterpret, CE);
426  }
427 
428  if (DiscardResult)
429  return this->discard(SubExpr);
430 
431  QualType SubExprTy = SubExpr->getType();
432  std::optional<PrimType> FromT = classify(SubExprTy);
433  std::optional<PrimType> ToT = classify(CE->getType());
434  if (!FromT || !ToT)
435  return false;
436 
437  assert(isPtrType(*FromT));
438  assert(isPtrType(*ToT));
439  if (FromT == ToT) {
440  if (CE->getType()->isVoidPointerType())
441  return this->delegate(SubExpr);
442 
443  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
444  return false;
445  if (FromT == PT_Ptr)
446  return this->emitPtrPtrCast(SubExprTy->isVoidPointerType(), CE);
447  return true;
448  }
449 
450  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
451  return false;
452  return this->emitDecayPtr(*FromT, *ToT, CE);
453  }
454 
455  case CK_IntegralToBoolean:
456  case CK_BooleanToSignedIntegral:
457  case CK_IntegralCast: {
458  if (DiscardResult)
459  return this->discard(SubExpr);
460  std::optional<PrimType> FromT = classify(SubExpr->getType());
461  std::optional<PrimType> ToT = classify(CE->getType());
462 
463  if (!FromT || !ToT)
464  return false;
465 
466  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
467  return false;
468 
469  if (ToT == PT_IntAP)
470  return this->emitCastAP(*FromT, Ctx.getBitWidth(CE->getType()), CE);
471  if (ToT == PT_IntAPS)
472  return this->emitCastAPS(*FromT, Ctx.getBitWidth(CE->getType()), CE);
473 
474  if (FromT == ToT)
475  return true;
476  if (!this->emitCast(*FromT, *ToT, CE))
477  return false;
478 
479  if (CE->getCastKind() == CK_BooleanToSignedIntegral)
480  return this->emitNeg(*ToT, CE);
481  return true;
482  }
483 
484  case CK_PointerToBoolean:
485  case CK_MemberPointerToBoolean: {
486  PrimType PtrT = classifyPrim(SubExpr->getType());
487 
488  // Just emit p != nullptr for this.
489  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
490  return false;
491 
492  if (!this->emitNull(PtrT, nullptr, CE))
493  return false;
494 
495  return this->emitNE(PtrT, CE);
496  }
497 
498  case CK_IntegralComplexToBoolean:
499  case CK_FloatingComplexToBoolean: {
500  if (DiscardResult)
501  return this->discard(SubExpr);
502  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
503  return false;
504  return this->emitComplexBoolCast(SubExpr);
505  }
506 
507  case CK_IntegralComplexToReal:
508  case CK_FloatingComplexToReal:
509  return this->emitComplexReal(SubExpr);
510 
511  case CK_IntegralRealToComplex:
512  case CK_FloatingRealToComplex: {
513  // We're creating a complex value here, so we need to
514  // allocate storage for it.
515  if (!Initializing) {
516  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(CE);
517  if (!LocalIndex)
518  return false;
519  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, CE))
520  return false;
521  }
522 
523  // Init the complex value to {SubExpr, 0}.
524  if (!this->visitArrayElemInit(0, SubExpr))
525  return false;
526  // Zero-init the second element.
527  PrimType T = classifyPrim(SubExpr->getType());
528  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(T, SubExpr->getType(), SubExpr))
529  return false;
530  return this->emitInitElem(T, 1, SubExpr);
531  }
532 
533  case CK_IntegralComplexCast:
534  case CK_FloatingComplexCast:
535  case CK_IntegralComplexToFloatingComplex:
536  case CK_FloatingComplexToIntegralComplex: {
537  assert(CE->getType()->isAnyComplexType());
538  assert(SubExpr->getType()->isAnyComplexType());
539  if (DiscardResult)
540  return this->discard(SubExpr);
541 
542  if (!Initializing) {
543  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(CE);
544  if (!LocalIndex)
545  return false;
546  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, CE))
547  return false;
548  }
549 
550  // Location for the SubExpr.
551  // Since SubExpr is of complex type, visiting it results in a pointer
552  // anyway, so we just create a temporary pointer variable.
553  unsigned SubExprOffset = allocateLocalPrimitive(
554  SubExpr, PT_Ptr, /*IsConst=*/true, /*IsExtended=*/false);
555  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
556  return false;
557  if (!this->emitSetLocal(PT_Ptr, SubExprOffset, CE))
558  return false;
559 
560  PrimType SourceElemT = classifyComplexElementType(SubExpr->getType());
561  QualType DestElemType =
562  CE->getType()->getAs<ComplexType>()->getElementType();
563  PrimType DestElemT = classifyPrim(DestElemType);
564  // Cast both elements individually.
565  for (unsigned I = 0; I != 2; ++I) {
566  if (!this->emitGetLocal(PT_Ptr, SubExprOffset, CE))
567  return false;
568  if (!this->emitArrayElemPop(SourceElemT, I, CE))
569  return false;
570 
571  // Do the cast.
572  if (!this->emitPrimCast(SourceElemT, DestElemT, DestElemType, CE))
573  return false;
574 
575  // Save the value.
576  if (!this->emitInitElem(DestElemT, I, CE))
577  return false;
578  }
579  return true;
580  }
581 
582  case CK_VectorSplat: {
583  assert(!classify(CE->getType()));
584  assert(classify(SubExpr->getType()));
585  assert(CE->getType()->isVectorType());
586 
587  if (DiscardResult)
588  return this->discard(SubExpr);
589 
590  if (!Initializing) {
591  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(CE);
592  if (!LocalIndex)
593  return false;
594  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, CE))
595  return false;
596  }
597 
598  const auto *VT = CE->getType()->getAs<VectorType>();
599  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(SubExpr->getType());
600  unsigned ElemOffset = allocateLocalPrimitive(
601  SubExpr, ElemT, /*IsConst=*/true, /*IsExtended=*/false);
602 
603  // Prepare a local variable for the scalar value.
604  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
605  return false;
606  if (classifyPrim(SubExpr) == PT_Ptr && !this->emitLoadPop(ElemT, CE))
607  return false;
608 
609  if (!this->emitSetLocal(ElemT, ElemOffset, CE))
610  return false;
611 
612  for (unsigned I = 0; I != VT->getNumElements(); ++I) {
613  if (!this->emitGetLocal(ElemT, ElemOffset, CE))
614  return false;
615  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, I, CE))
616  return false;
617  }
618 
619  return true;
620  }
621 
622  case CK_ToVoid:
623  return discard(SubExpr);
624 
625  default:
626  return this->emitInvalid(CE);
627  }
628  llvm_unreachable("Unhandled clang::CastKind enum");
629 }
630 
631 template <class Emitter>
632 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitIntegerLiteral(const IntegerLiteral *LE) {
633  if (DiscardResult)
634  return true;
635 
636  return this->emitConst(LE->getValue(), LE);
637 }
638 
639 template <class Emitter>
640 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitFloatingLiteral(const FloatingLiteral *E) {
641  if (DiscardResult)
642  return true;
643 
644  return this->emitConstFloat(E->getValue(), E);
645 }
646 
647 template <class Emitter>
648 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitImaginaryLiteral(const ImaginaryLiteral *E) {
649  assert(E->getType()->isAnyComplexType());
650  if (DiscardResult)
651  return true;
652 
653  if (!Initializing) {
654  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(E);
655  if (!LocalIndex)
656  return false;
657  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E))
658  return false;
659  }
660 
661  const Expr *SubExpr = E->getSubExpr();
662  PrimType SubExprT = classifyPrim(SubExpr->getType());
663 
664  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(SubExprT, SubExpr->getType(), SubExpr))
665  return false;
666  if (!this->emitInitElem(SubExprT, 0, SubExpr))
667  return false;
668  return this->visitArrayElemInit(1, SubExpr);
669 }
670 
671 template <class Emitter>
672 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitParenExpr(const ParenExpr *E) {
673  return this->delegate(E->getSubExpr());
674 }
675 
676 template <class Emitter>
677 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitBinaryOperator(const BinaryOperator *BO) {
678  // Need short-circuiting for these.
679  if (BO->isLogicalOp())
680  return this->VisitLogicalBinOp(BO);
681 
682  const Expr *LHS = BO->getLHS();
683  const Expr *RHS = BO->getRHS();
684 
685  // Handle comma operators. Just discard the LHS
686  // and delegate to RHS.
687  if (BO->isCommaOp()) {
688  if (!this->discard(LHS))
689  return false;
690  if (RHS->getType()->isVoidType())
691  return this->discard(RHS);
692 
693  return this->delegate(RHS);
694  }
695 
696  if (BO->getType()->isAnyComplexType())
697  return this->VisitComplexBinOp(BO);
698  if ((LHS->getType()->isAnyComplexType() ||
699  RHS->getType()->isAnyComplexType()) &&
700  BO->isComparisonOp())
701  return this->emitComplexComparison(LHS, RHS, BO);
702 
703  if (BO->isPtrMemOp()) {
704  if (!this->visit(LHS))
705  return false;
706 
707  if (!this->visit(RHS))
708  return false;
709 
710  if (!this->emitToMemberPtr(BO))
711  return false;
712 
713  if (classifyPrim(BO) == PT_MemberPtr)
714  return true;
715 
716  if (!this->emitCastMemberPtrPtr(BO))
717  return false;
718  return DiscardResult ? this->emitPopPtr(BO) : true;
719  }
720 
721  // Typecheck the args.
722  std::optional<PrimType> LT = classify(LHS->getType());
723  std::optional<PrimType> RT = classify(RHS->getType());
724  std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(BO->getType());
725 
726  // Special case for C++'s three-way/spaceship operator <=>, which
727  // returns a std::{strong,weak,partial}_ordering (which is a class, so doesn't
728  // have a PrimType).
729  if (!T && BO->getOpcode() == BO_Cmp) {
730  if (DiscardResult)
731  return true;
732  const ComparisonCategoryInfo *CmpInfo =
733  Ctx.getASTContext().CompCategories.lookupInfoForType(BO->getType());
734  assert(CmpInfo);
735 
736  // We need a temporary variable holding our return value.
737  if (!Initializing) {
738  std::optional<unsigned> ResultIndex = this->allocateLocal(BO);
739  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*ResultIndex, BO))
740  return false;
741  }
742 
743  if (!visit(LHS) || !visit(RHS))
744  return false;
745 
746  return this->emitCMP3(*LT, CmpInfo, BO);
747  }
748 
749  if (!LT || !RT || !T)
750  return false;
751 
752  // Pointer arithmetic special case.
753  if (BO->getOpcode() == BO_Add || BO->getOpcode() == BO_Sub) {
754  if (isPtrType(*T) || (isPtrType(*LT) && isPtrType(*RT)))
755  return this->VisitPointerArithBinOp(BO);
756  }
757 
758  if (!visit(LHS) || !visit(RHS))
759  return false;
760 
761  // For languages such as C, cast the result of one
762  // of our comparision opcodes to T (which is usually int).
763  auto MaybeCastToBool = [this, T, BO](bool Result) {
764  if (!Result)
765  return false;
766  if (DiscardResult)
767  return this->emitPop(*T, BO);
768  if (T != PT_Bool)
769  return this->emitCast(PT_Bool, *T, BO);
770  return true;
771  };
772 
773  auto Discard = [this, T, BO](bool Result) {
774  if (!Result)
775  return false;
776  return DiscardResult ? this->emitPop(*T, BO) : true;
777  };
778 
779  switch (BO->getOpcode()) {
780  case BO_EQ:
781  return MaybeCastToBool(this->emitEQ(*LT, BO));
782  case BO_NE:
783  return MaybeCastToBool(this->emitNE(*LT, BO));
784  case BO_LT:
785  return MaybeCastToBool(this->emitLT(*LT, BO));
786  case BO_LE:
787  return MaybeCastToBool(this->emitLE(*LT, BO));
788  case BO_GT:
789  return MaybeCastToBool(this->emitGT(*LT, BO));
790  case BO_GE:
791  return MaybeCastToBool(this->emitGE(*LT, BO));
792  case BO_Sub:
793  if (BO->getType()->isFloatingType())
794  return Discard(this->emitSubf(getRoundingMode(BO), BO));
795  return Discard(this->emitSub(*T, BO));
796  case BO_Add:
797  if (BO->getType()->isFloatingType())
798  return Discard(this->emitAddf(getRoundingMode(BO), BO));
799  return Discard(this->emitAdd(*T, BO));
800  case BO_Mul:
801  if (BO->getType()->isFloatingType())
802  return Discard(this->emitMulf(getRoundingMode(BO), BO));
803  return Discard(this->emitMul(*T, BO));
804  case BO_Rem:
805  return Discard(this->emitRem(*T, BO));
806  case BO_Div:
807  if (BO->getType()->isFloatingType())
808  return Discard(this->emitDivf(getRoundingMode(BO), BO));
809  return Discard(this->emitDiv(*T, BO));
810  case BO_Assign:
811  if (DiscardResult)
812  return LHS->refersToBitField() ? this->emitStoreBitFieldPop(*T, BO)
813  : this->emitStorePop(*T, BO);
814  if (LHS->refersToBitField()) {
815  if (!this->emitStoreBitField(*T, BO))
816  return false;
817  } else {
818  if (!this->emitStore(*T, BO))
819  return false;
820  }
821  // Assignments aren't necessarily lvalues in C.
822  // Load from them in that case.
823  if (!BO->isLValue())
824  return this->emitLoadPop(*T, BO);
825  return true;
826  case BO_And:
827  return Discard(this->emitBitAnd(*T, BO));
828  case BO_Or:
829  return Discard(this->emitBitOr(*T, BO));
830  case BO_Shl:
831  return Discard(this->emitShl(*LT, *RT, BO));
832  case BO_Shr:
833  return Discard(this->emitShr(*LT, *RT, BO));
834  case BO_Xor:
835  return Discard(this->emitBitXor(*T, BO));
836  case BO_LOr:
837  case BO_LAnd:
838  llvm_unreachable("Already handled earlier");
839  default:
840  return false;
841  }
842 
843  llvm_unreachable("Unhandled binary op");
844 }
845 
846 /// Perform addition/subtraction of a pointer and an integer or
847 /// subtraction of two pointers.
848 template <class Emitter>
849 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitPointerArithBinOp(const BinaryOperator *E) {
850  BinaryOperatorKind Op = E->getOpcode();
851  const Expr *LHS = E->getLHS();
852  const Expr *RHS = E->getRHS();
853 
854  if ((Op != BO_Add && Op != BO_Sub) ||
855  (!LHS->getType()->isPointerType() && !RHS->getType()->isPointerType()))
856  return false;
857 
858  std::optional<PrimType> LT = classify(LHS);
859  std::optional<PrimType> RT = classify(RHS);
860 
861  if (!LT || !RT)
862  return false;
863 
864  if (LHS->getType()->isPointerType() && RHS->getType()->isPointerType()) {
865  if (Op != BO_Sub)
866  return false;
867 
868  assert(E->getType()->isIntegerType());
869  if (!visit(RHS) || !visit(LHS))
870  return false;
871 
872  return this->emitSubPtr(classifyPrim(E->getType()), E);
873  }
874 
875  PrimType OffsetType;
876  if (LHS->getType()->isIntegerType()) {
877  if (!visit(RHS) || !visit(LHS))
878  return false;
879  OffsetType = *LT;
880  } else if (RHS->getType()->isIntegerType()) {
881  if (!visit(LHS) || !visit(RHS))
882  return false;
883  OffsetType = *RT;
884  } else {
885  return false;
886  }
887 
888  if (Op == BO_Add)
889  return this->emitAddOffset(OffsetType, E);
890  else if (Op == BO_Sub)
891  return this->emitSubOffset(OffsetType, E);
892 
893  return false;
894 }
895 
896 template <class Emitter>
897 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitLogicalBinOp(const BinaryOperator *E) {
898  assert(E->isLogicalOp());
899  BinaryOperatorKind Op = E->getOpcode();
900  const Expr *LHS = E->getLHS();
901  const Expr *RHS = E->getRHS();
902  std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(E->getType());
903 
904  if (Op == BO_LOr) {
905  // Logical OR. Visit LHS and only evaluate RHS if LHS was FALSE.
906  LabelTy LabelTrue = this->getLabel();
907  LabelTy LabelEnd = this->getLabel();
908 
909  if (!this->visitBool(LHS))
910  return false;
911  if (!this->jumpTrue(LabelTrue))
912  return false;
913 
914  if (!this->visitBool(RHS))
915  return false;
916  if (!this->jump(LabelEnd))
917  return false;
918 
919  this->emitLabel(LabelTrue);
920  this->emitConstBool(true, E);
921  this->fallthrough(LabelEnd);
922  this->emitLabel(LabelEnd);
923 
924  } else {
925  assert(Op == BO_LAnd);
926  // Logical AND.
927  // Visit LHS. Only visit RHS if LHS was TRUE.
928  LabelTy LabelFalse = this->getLabel();
929  LabelTy LabelEnd = this->getLabel();
930 
931  if (!this->visitBool(LHS))
932  return false;
933  if (!this->jumpFalse(LabelFalse))
934  return false;
935 
936  if (!this->visitBool(RHS))
937  return false;
938  if (!this->jump(LabelEnd))
939  return false;
940 
941  this->emitLabel(LabelFalse);
942  this->emitConstBool(false, E);
943  this->fallthrough(LabelEnd);
944  this->emitLabel(LabelEnd);
945  }
946 
947  if (DiscardResult)
948  return this->emitPopBool(E);
949 
950  // For C, cast back to integer type.
951  assert(T);
952  if (T != PT_Bool)
953  return this->emitCast(PT_Bool, *T, E);
954  return true;
955 }
956 
957 template <class Emitter>
958 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitComplexBinOp(const BinaryOperator *E) {
959  // Prepare storage for result.
960  if (!Initializing) {
961  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(E);
962  if (!LocalIndex)
963  return false;
964  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E))
965  return false;
966  }
967 
968  // Both LHS and RHS might _not_ be of complex type, but one of them
969  // needs to be.
970  const Expr *LHS = E->getLHS();
971  const Expr *RHS = E->getRHS();
972 
973  PrimType ResultElemT = this->classifyComplexElementType(E->getType());
974  unsigned ResultOffset = ~0u;
975  if (!DiscardResult)
976  ResultOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(E, PT_Ptr, true, false);
977 
978  // Save result pointer in ResultOffset
979  if (!this->DiscardResult) {
980  if (!this->emitDupPtr(E))
981  return false;
982  if (!this->emitSetLocal(PT_Ptr, ResultOffset, E))
983  return false;
984  }
985  QualType LHSType = LHS->getType();
986  if (const auto *AT = LHSType->getAs<AtomicType>())
987  LHSType = AT->getValueType();
988  QualType RHSType = RHS->getType();
989  if (const auto *AT = RHSType->getAs<AtomicType>())
990  RHSType = AT->getValueType();
991 
992  bool LHSIsComplex = LHSType->isAnyComplexType();
993  unsigned LHSOffset;
994  bool RHSIsComplex = RHSType->isAnyComplexType();
995 
996  // For ComplexComplex Mul, we have special ops to make their implementation
997  // easier.
998  BinaryOperatorKind Op = E->getOpcode();
999  if (Op == BO_Mul && LHSIsComplex && RHSIsComplex) {
1000  assert(classifyPrim(LHSType->getAs<ComplexType>()->getElementType()) ==
1001  classifyPrim(RHSType->getAs<ComplexType>()->getElementType()));
1002  PrimType ElemT =
1003  classifyPrim(LHSType->getAs<ComplexType>()->getElementType());
1004  if (!this->visit(LHS))
1005  return false;
1006  if (!this->visit(RHS))
1007  return false;
1008  return this->emitMulc(ElemT, E);
1009  }
1010 
1011  if (Op == BO_Div && RHSIsComplex) {
1012  QualType ElemQT = RHSType->getAs<ComplexType>()->getElementType();
1013  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(ElemQT);
1014  // If the LHS is not complex, we still need to do the full complex
1015  // division, so just stub create a complex value and stub it out with
1016  // the LHS and a zero.
1017 
1018  if (!LHSIsComplex) {
1019  // This is using the RHS type for the fake-complex LHS.
1020  if (auto LHSO = allocateLocal(RHS))
1021  LHSOffset = *LHSO;
1022  else
1023  return false;
1024 
1025  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(LHSOffset, E))
1026  return false;
1027 
1028  if (!this->visit(LHS))
1029  return false;
1030  // real is LHS
1031  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, 0, E))
1032  return false;
1033  // imag is zero
1034  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(ElemT, ElemQT, E))
1035  return false;
1036  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, 1, E))
1037  return false;
1038  } else {
1039  if (!this->visit(LHS))
1040  return false;
1041  }
1042 
1043  if (!this->visit(RHS))
1044  return false;
1045  return this->emitDivc(ElemT, E);
1046  }
1047 
1048  // Evaluate LHS and save value to LHSOffset.
1049  if (LHSType->isAnyComplexType()) {
1050  LHSOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(LHS, PT_Ptr, true, false);
1051  if (!this->visit(LHS))
1052  return false;
1053  if (!this->emitSetLocal(PT_Ptr, LHSOffset, E))
1054  return false;
1055  } else {
1056  PrimType LHST = classifyPrim(LHSType);
1057  LHSOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(LHS, LHST, true, false);
1058  if (!this->visit(LHS))
1059  return false;
1060  if (!this->emitSetLocal(LHST, LHSOffset, E))
1061  return false;
1062  }
1063 
1064  // Same with RHS.
1065  unsigned RHSOffset;
1066  if (RHSType->isAnyComplexType()) {
1067  RHSOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(RHS, PT_Ptr, true, false);
1068  if (!this->visit(RHS))
1069  return false;
1070  if (!this->emitSetLocal(PT_Ptr, RHSOffset, E))
1071  return false;
1072  } else {
1073  PrimType RHST = classifyPrim(RHSType);
1074  RHSOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(RHS, RHST, true, false);
1075  if (!this->visit(RHS))
1076  return false;
1077  if (!this->emitSetLocal(RHST, RHSOffset, E))
1078  return false;
1079  }
1080 
1081  // For both LHS and RHS, either load the value from the complex pointer, or
1082  // directly from the local variable. For index 1 (i.e. the imaginary part),
1083  // just load 0 and do the operation anyway.
1084  auto loadComplexValue = [this](bool IsComplex, bool LoadZero,
1085  unsigned ElemIndex, unsigned Offset,
1086  const Expr *E) -> bool {
1087  if (IsComplex) {
1088  if (!this->emitGetLocal(PT_Ptr, Offset, E))
1089  return false;
1090  return this->emitArrayElemPop(classifyComplexElementType(E->getType()),
1091  ElemIndex, E);
1092  }
1093  if (ElemIndex == 0 || !LoadZero)
1094  return this->emitGetLocal(classifyPrim(E->getType()), Offset, E);
1095  return this->visitZeroInitializer(classifyPrim(E->getType()), E->getType(),
1096  E);
1097  };
1098 
1099  // Now we can get pointers to the LHS and RHS from the offsets above.
1100  for (unsigned ElemIndex = 0; ElemIndex != 2; ++ElemIndex) {
1101  // Result pointer for the store later.
1102  if (!this->DiscardResult) {
1103  if (!this->emitGetLocal(PT_Ptr, ResultOffset, E))
1104  return false;
1105  }
1106 
1107  // The actual operation.
1108  switch (Op) {
1109  case BO_Add:
1110  if (!loadComplexValue(LHSIsComplex, true, ElemIndex, LHSOffset, LHS))
1111  return false;
1112 
1113  if (!loadComplexValue(RHSIsComplex, true, ElemIndex, RHSOffset, RHS))
1114  return false;
1115  if (ResultElemT == PT_Float) {
1116  if (!this->emitAddf(getRoundingMode(E), E))
1117  return false;
1118  } else {
1119  if (!this->emitAdd(ResultElemT, E))
1120  return false;
1121  }
1122  break;
1123  case BO_Sub:
1124  if (!loadComplexValue(LHSIsComplex, true, ElemIndex, LHSOffset, LHS))
1125  return false;
1126 
1127  if (!loadComplexValue(RHSIsComplex, true, ElemIndex, RHSOffset, RHS))
1128  return false;
1129  if (ResultElemT == PT_Float) {
1130  if (!this->emitSubf(getRoundingMode(E), E))
1131  return false;
1132  } else {
1133  if (!this->emitSub(ResultElemT, E))
1134  return false;
1135  }
1136  break;
1137  case BO_Mul:
1138  if (!loadComplexValue(LHSIsComplex, false, ElemIndex, LHSOffset, LHS))
1139  return false;
1140 
1141  if (!loadComplexValue(RHSIsComplex, false, ElemIndex, RHSOffset, RHS))
1142  return false;
1143 
1144  if (ResultElemT == PT_Float) {
1145  if (!this->emitMulf(getRoundingMode(E), E))
1146  return false;
1147  } else {
1148  if (!this->emitMul(ResultElemT, E))
1149  return false;
1150  }
1151  break;
1152  case BO_Div:
1153  assert(!RHSIsComplex);
1154  if (!loadComplexValue(LHSIsComplex, false, ElemIndex, LHSOffset, LHS))
1155  return false;
1156 
1157  if (!loadComplexValue(RHSIsComplex, false, ElemIndex, RHSOffset, RHS))
1158  return false;
1159 
1160  if (ResultElemT == PT_Float) {
1161  if (!this->emitDivf(getRoundingMode(E), E))
1162  return false;
1163  } else {
1164  if (!this->emitDiv(ResultElemT, E))
1165  return false;
1166  }
1167  break;
1168 
1169  default:
1170  return false;
1171  }
1172 
1173  if (!this->DiscardResult) {
1174  // Initialize array element with the value we just computed.
1175  if (!this->emitInitElemPop(ResultElemT, ElemIndex, E))
1176  return false;
1177  } else {
1178  if (!this->emitPop(ResultElemT, E))
1179  return false;
1180  }
1181  }
1182  return true;
1183 }
1184 
1185 template <class Emitter>
1186 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitImplicitValueInitExpr(
1187  const ImplicitValueInitExpr *E) {
1188  QualType QT = E->getType();
1189 
1190  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(QT))
1191  return this->visitZeroInitializer(*T, QT, E);
1192 
1193  if (QT->isRecordType()) {
1194  const RecordDecl *RD = QT->getAsRecordDecl();
1195  assert(RD);
1196  if (RD->isInvalidDecl())
1197  return false;
1198  if (RD->isUnion()) {
1199  // C++11 [dcl.init]p5: If T is a (possibly cv-qualified) union type, the
1200  // object's first non-static named data member is zero-initialized
1201  // FIXME
1202  return false;
1203  }
1204 
1205  if (const auto *CXXRD = dyn_cast<CXXRecordDecl>(RD);
1206  CXXRD && CXXRD->getNumVBases() > 0) {
1207  // TODO: Diagnose.
1208  return false;
1209  }
1210 
1211  const Record *R = getRecord(QT);
1212  if (!R)
1213  return false;
1214 
1215  assert(Initializing);
1216  return this->visitZeroRecordInitializer(R, E);
1217  }
1218 
1219  if (QT->isIncompleteArrayType())
1220  return true;
1221 
1222  if (QT->isArrayType()) {
1223  const ArrayType *AT = QT->getAsArrayTypeUnsafe();
1224  assert(AT);
1225  const auto *CAT = cast<ConstantArrayType>(AT);
1226  size_t NumElems = CAT->getZExtSize();
1227  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(CAT->getElementType());
1228 
1229  for (size_t I = 0; I != NumElems; ++I) {
1230  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(ElemT, CAT->getElementType(), E))
1231  return false;
1232  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, I, E))
1233  return false;
1234  }
1235 
1236  return true;
1237  }
1238 
1239  if (const auto *ComplexTy = E->getType()->getAs<ComplexType>()) {
1240  assert(Initializing);
1241  QualType ElemQT = ComplexTy->getElementType();
1242  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(ElemQT);
1243  for (unsigned I = 0; I < 2; ++I) {
1244  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(ElemT, ElemQT, E))
1245  return false;
1246  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, I, E))
1247  return false;
1248  }
1249  return true;
1250  }
1251 
1252  if (const auto *VecT = E->getType()->getAs<VectorType>()) {
1253  unsigned NumVecElements = VecT->getNumElements();
1254  QualType ElemQT = VecT->getElementType();
1255  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(ElemQT);
1256 
1257  for (unsigned I = 0; I < NumVecElements; ++I) {
1258  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(ElemT, ElemQT, E))
1259  return false;
1260  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, I, E))
1261  return false;
1262  }
1263  return true;
1264  }
1265 
1266  return false;
1267 }
1268 
1269 template <class Emitter>
1270 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitArraySubscriptExpr(const ArraySubscriptExpr *E) {
1271  const Expr *Base = E->getBase();
1272  const Expr *Index = E->getIdx();
1273 
1274  if (DiscardResult)
1275  return this->discard(Base) && this->discard(Index);
1276 
1277  // Take pointer of LHS, add offset from RHS.
1278  // What's left on the stack after this is a pointer.
1279  if (!this->visit(Base))
1280  return false;
1281 
1282  if (!this->visit(Index))
1283  return false;
1284 
1285  PrimType IndexT = classifyPrim(Index->getType());
1286  return this->emitArrayElemPtrPop(IndexT, E);
1287 }
1288 
1289 template <class Emitter>
1290 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitInitList(ArrayRef<const Expr *> Inits,
1291  const Expr *ArrayFiller, const Expr *E) {
1292 
1293  QualType QT = E->getType();
1294 
1295  if (const auto *AT = QT->getAs<AtomicType>())
1296  QT = AT->getValueType();
1297 
1298  if (QT->isVoidType())
1299  return this->emitInvalid(E);
1300 
1301  // Handle discarding first.
1302  if (DiscardResult) {
1303  for (const Expr *Init : Inits) {
1304  if (!this->discard(Init))
1305  return false;
1306  }
1307  return true;
1308  }
1309 
1310  // Primitive values.
1311  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(QT)) {
1312  assert(!DiscardResult);
1313  if (Inits.size() == 0)
1314  return this->visitZeroInitializer(*T, QT, E);
1315  assert(Inits.size() == 1);
1316  return this->delegate(Inits[0]);
1317  }
1318 
1319  if (QT->isRecordType()) {
1320  const Record *R = getRecord(QT);
1321 
1322  if (Inits.size() == 1 && E->getType() == Inits[0]->getType())
1323  return this->delegate(Inits[0]);
1324 
1325  auto initPrimitiveField = [=](const Record::Field *FieldToInit,
1326  const Expr *Init, PrimType T) -> bool {
1327  if (!this->visit(Init))
1328  return false;
1329 
1330  if (FieldToInit->isBitField())
1331  return this->emitInitBitField(T, FieldToInit, E);
1332  return this->emitInitField(T, FieldToInit->Offset, E);
1333  };
1334 
1335  auto initCompositeField = [=](const Record::Field *FieldToInit,
1336  const Expr *Init) -> bool {
1337  InitLinkScope<Emitter> ILS(this, InitLink::Field(FieldToInit->Offset));
1338  // Non-primitive case. Get a pointer to the field-to-initialize
1339  // on the stack and recurse into visitInitializer().
1340  if (!this->emitGetPtrField(FieldToInit->Offset, Init))
1341  return false;
1342  if (!this->visitInitializer(Init))
1343  return false;
1344  return this->emitPopPtr(E);
1345  };
1346 
1347  if (R->isUnion()) {
1348  if (Inits.size() == 0) {
1349  // Zero-initialize the first union field.
1350  if (R->getNumFields() == 0)
1351  return this->emitFinishInit(E);
1352  const Record::Field *FieldToInit = R->getField(0u);
1353  QualType FieldType = FieldToInit->Desc->getType();
1354  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(FieldType)) {
1355  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(*T, FieldType, E))
1356  return false;
1357  if (!this->emitInitField(*T, FieldToInit->Offset, E))
1358  return false;
1359  }
1360  // FIXME: Non-primitive case?
1361  } else {
1362  const Expr *Init = Inits[0];
1363  const FieldDecl *FToInit = nullptr;
1364  if (const auto *ILE = dyn_cast<InitListExpr>(E))
1365  FToInit = ILE->getInitializedFieldInUnion();
1366  else
1367  FToInit = cast<CXXParenListInitExpr>(E)->getInitializedFieldInUnion();
1368 
1369  const Record::Field *FieldToInit = R->getField(FToInit);
1370  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(Init)) {
1371  if (!initPrimitiveField(FieldToInit, Init, *T))
1372  return false;
1373  } else {
1374  if (!initCompositeField(FieldToInit, Init))
1375  return false;
1376  }
1377  }
1378  return this->emitFinishInit(E);
1379  }
1380 
1381  assert(!R->isUnion());
1382  unsigned InitIndex = 0;
1383  for (const Expr *Init : Inits) {
1384  // Skip unnamed bitfields.
1385  while (InitIndex < R->getNumFields() &&
1386  R->getField(InitIndex)->Decl->isUnnamedBitField())
1387  ++InitIndex;
1388 
1389  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(Init)) {
1390  const Record::Field *FieldToInit = R->getField(InitIndex);
1391  if (!initPrimitiveField(FieldToInit, Init, *T))
1392  return false;
1393  ++InitIndex;
1394  } else {
1395  // Initializer for a direct base class.
1396  if (const Record::Base *B = R->getBase(Init->getType())) {
1397  if (!this->emitGetPtrBase(B->Offset, Init))
1398  return false;
1399 
1400  if (!this->visitInitializer(Init))
1401  return false;
1402 
1403  if (!this->emitFinishInitPop(E))
1404  return false;
1405  // Base initializers don't increase InitIndex, since they don't count
1406  // into the Record's fields.
1407  } else {
1408  const Record::Field *FieldToInit = R->getField(InitIndex);
1409  if (!initCompositeField(FieldToInit, Init))
1410  return false;
1411  ++InitIndex;
1412  }
1413  }
1414  }
1415  return this->emitFinishInit(E);
1416  }
1417 
1418  if (QT->isArrayType()) {
1419  if (Inits.size() == 1 && QT == Inits[0]->getType())
1420  return this->delegate(Inits[0]);
1421 
1422  unsigned ElementIndex = 0;
1423  for (const Expr *Init : Inits) {
1424  if (const auto *EmbedS =
1425  dyn_cast<EmbedExpr>(Init->IgnoreParenImpCasts())) {
1426  PrimType TargetT = classifyPrim(Init->getType());
1427 
1428  auto Eval = [&](const Expr *Init, unsigned ElemIndex) {
1429  PrimType InitT = classifyPrim(Init->getType());
1430  if (!this->visit(Init))
1431  return false;
1432  if (InitT != TargetT) {
1433  if (!this->emitCast(InitT, TargetT, E))
1434  return false;
1435  }
1436  return this->emitInitElem(TargetT, ElemIndex, Init);
1437  };
1438  if (!EmbedS->doForEachDataElement(Eval, ElementIndex))
1439  return false;
1440  } else {
1441  if (!this->visitArrayElemInit(ElementIndex, Init))
1442  return false;
1443  ++ElementIndex;
1444  }
1445  }
1446 
1447  // Expand the filler expression.
1448  // FIXME: This should go away.
1449  if (ArrayFiller) {
1450  const ConstantArrayType *CAT =
1451  Ctx.getASTContext().getAsConstantArrayType(QT);
1452  uint64_t NumElems = CAT->getZExtSize();
1453 
1454  for (; ElementIndex != NumElems; ++ElementIndex) {
1455  if (!this->visitArrayElemInit(ElementIndex, ArrayFiller))
1456  return false;
1457  }
1458  }
1459 
1460  return this->emitFinishInit(E);
1461  }
1462 
1463  if (const auto *ComplexTy = QT->getAs<ComplexType>()) {
1464  unsigned NumInits = Inits.size();
1465 
1466  if (NumInits == 1)
1467  return this->delegate(Inits[0]);
1468 
1469  QualType ElemQT = ComplexTy->getElementType();
1470  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(ElemQT);
1471  if (NumInits == 0) {
1472  // Zero-initialize both elements.
1473  for (unsigned I = 0; I < 2; ++I) {
1474  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(ElemT, ElemQT, E))
1475  return false;
1476  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, I, E))
1477  return false;
1478  }
1479  } else if (NumInits == 2) {
1480  unsigned InitIndex = 0;
1481  for (const Expr *Init : Inits) {
1482  if (!this->visit(Init))
1483  return false;
1484 
1485  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, InitIndex, E))
1486  return false;
1487  ++InitIndex;
1488  }
1489  }
1490  return true;
1491  }
1492 
1493  if (const auto *VecT = QT->getAs<VectorType>()) {
1494  unsigned NumVecElements = VecT->getNumElements();
1495  assert(NumVecElements >= Inits.size());
1496 
1497  QualType ElemQT = VecT->getElementType();
1498  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(ElemQT);
1499 
1500  // All initializer elements.
1501  unsigned InitIndex = 0;
1502  for (const Expr *Init : Inits) {
1503  if (!this->visit(Init))
1504  return false;
1505 
1506  // If the initializer is of vector type itself, we have to deconstruct
1507  // that and initialize all the target fields from the initializer fields.
1508  if (const auto *InitVecT = Init->getType()->getAs<VectorType>()) {
1509  if (!this->emitCopyArray(ElemT, 0, InitIndex,
1510  InitVecT->getNumElements(), E))
1511  return false;
1512  InitIndex += InitVecT->getNumElements();
1513  } else {
1514  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, InitIndex, E))
1515  return false;
1516  ++InitIndex;
1517  }
1518  }
1519 
1520  assert(InitIndex <= NumVecElements);
1521 
1522  // Fill the rest with zeroes.
1523  for (; InitIndex != NumVecElements; ++InitIndex) {
1524  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(ElemT, ElemQT, E))
1525  return false;
1526  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, InitIndex, E))
1527  return false;
1528  }
1529  return true;
1530  }
1531 
1532  return false;
1533 }
1534 
1535 /// Pointer to the array(not the element!) must be on the stack when calling
1536 /// this.
1537 template <class Emitter>
1538 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitArrayElemInit(unsigned ElemIndex,
1539  const Expr *Init) {
1540  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(Init->getType())) {
1541  // Visit the primitive element like normal.
1542  if (!this->visit(Init))
1543  return false;
1544  return this->emitInitElem(*T, ElemIndex, Init);
1545  }
1546 
1547  // Advance the pointer currently on the stack to the given
1548  // dimension.
1549  if (!this->emitConstUint32(ElemIndex, Init))
1550  return false;
1551  if (!this->emitArrayElemPtrUint32(Init))
1552  return false;
1553  if (!this->visitInitializer(Init))
1554  return false;
1555  return this->emitFinishInitPop(Init);
1556 }
1557 
1558 template <class Emitter>
1559 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitInitListExpr(const InitListExpr *E) {
1560  return this->visitInitList(E->inits(), E->getArrayFiller(), E);
1561 }
1562 
1563 template <class Emitter>
1564 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXParenListInitExpr(
1565  const CXXParenListInitExpr *E) {
1566  return this->visitInitList(E->getInitExprs(), E->getArrayFiller(), E);
1567 }
1568 
1569 template <class Emitter>
1570 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitSubstNonTypeTemplateParmExpr(
1571  const SubstNonTypeTemplateParmExpr *E) {
1572  return this->delegate(E->getReplacement());
1573 }
1574 
1575 template <class Emitter>
1576 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitConstantExpr(const ConstantExpr *E) {
1577  std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(E->getType());
1578  if (T && E->hasAPValueResult()) {
1579  // Try to emit the APValue directly, without visiting the subexpr.
1580  // This will only fail if we can't emit the APValue, so won't emit any
1581  // diagnostics or any double values.
1582  if (DiscardResult)
1583  return true;
1584 
1585  if (this->visitAPValue(E->getAPValueResult(), *T, E))
1586  return true;
1587  }
1588  return this->delegate(E->getSubExpr());
1589 }
1590 
1591 template <class Emitter>
1592 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitEmbedExpr(const EmbedExpr *E) {
1593  auto It = E->begin();
1594  return this->visit(*It);
1595 }
1596 
1597 static CharUnits AlignOfType(QualType T, const ASTContext &ASTCtx,
1598  UnaryExprOrTypeTrait Kind) {
1599  bool AlignOfReturnsPreferred =
1600  ASTCtx.getLangOpts().getClangABICompat() <= LangOptions::ClangABI::Ver7;
1601 
1602  // C++ [expr.alignof]p3:
1603  // When alignof is applied to a reference type, the result is the
1604  // alignment of the referenced type.
1605  if (const auto *Ref = T->getAs<ReferenceType>())
1606  T = Ref->getPointeeType();
1607 
1608  if (T.getQualifiers().hasUnaligned())
1609  return CharUnits::One();
1610 
1611  // __alignof is defined to return the preferred alignment.
1612  // Before 8, clang returned the preferred alignment for alignof and
1613  // _Alignof as well.
1614  if (Kind == UETT_PreferredAlignOf || AlignOfReturnsPreferred)
1615  return ASTCtx.toCharUnitsFromBits(ASTCtx.getPreferredTypeAlign(T));
1616 
1617  return ASTCtx.getTypeAlignInChars(T);
1618 }
1619 
1620 template <class Emitter>
1621 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitUnaryExprOrTypeTraitExpr(
1622  const UnaryExprOrTypeTraitExpr *E) {
1623  UnaryExprOrTypeTrait Kind = E->getKind();
1624  const ASTContext &ASTCtx = Ctx.getASTContext();
1625 
1626  if (Kind == UETT_SizeOf || Kind == UETT_DataSizeOf) {
1627  QualType ArgType = E->getTypeOfArgument();
1628 
1629  // C++ [expr.sizeof]p2: "When applied to a reference or a reference type,
1630  // the result is the size of the referenced type."
1631  if (const auto *Ref = ArgType->getAs<ReferenceType>())
1632  ArgType = Ref->getPointeeType();
1633 
1634  CharUnits Size;
1635  if (ArgType->isVoidType() || ArgType->isFunctionType())
1636  Size = CharUnits::One();
1637  else {
1638  if (ArgType->isDependentType() || !ArgType->isConstantSizeType())
1639  return false;
1640 
1641  if (Kind == UETT_SizeOf)
1642  Size = ASTCtx.getTypeSizeInChars(ArgType);
1643  else
1644  Size = ASTCtx.getTypeInfoDataSizeInChars(ArgType).Width;
1645  }
1646 
1647  if (DiscardResult)
1648  return true;
1649 
1650  return this->emitConst(Size.getQuantity(), E);
1651  }
1652 
1653  if (Kind == UETT_AlignOf || Kind == UETT_PreferredAlignOf) {
1654  CharUnits Size;
1655 
1656  if (E->isArgumentType()) {
1657  QualType ArgType = E->getTypeOfArgument();
1658 
1659  Size = AlignOfType(ArgType, ASTCtx, Kind);
1660  } else {
1661  // Argument is an expression, not a type.
1662  const Expr *Arg = E->getArgumentExpr()->IgnoreParens();
1663 
1664  // The kinds of expressions that we have special-case logic here for
1665  // should be kept up to date with the special checks for those
1666  // expressions in Sema.
1667 
1668  // alignof decl is always accepted, even if it doesn't make sense: we
1669  // default to 1 in those cases.
1670  if (const auto *DRE = dyn_cast<DeclRefExpr>(Arg))
1671  Size = ASTCtx.getDeclAlign(DRE->getDecl(),
1672  /*RefAsPointee*/ true);
1673  else if (const auto *ME = dyn_cast<MemberExpr>(Arg))
1674  Size = ASTCtx.getDeclAlign(ME->getMemberDecl(),
1675  /*RefAsPointee*/ true);
1676  else
1677  Size = AlignOfType(Arg->getType(), ASTCtx, Kind);
1678  }
1679 
1680  if (DiscardResult)
1681  return true;
1682 
1683  return this->emitConst(Size.getQuantity(), E);
1684  }
1685 
1686  if (Kind == UETT_VectorElements) {
1687  if (const auto *VT = E->getTypeOfArgument()->getAs<VectorType>())
1688  return this->emitConst(VT->getNumElements(), E);
1689 
1690  // FIXME: Apparently we need to catch the fact that a sizeless vector type
1691  // has been passed and diagnose that (at run time).
1692  assert(E->getTypeOfArgument()->isSizelessVectorType());
1693  }
1694 
1695  if (Kind == UETT_VecStep) {
1696  if (const auto *VT = E->getTypeOfArgument()->getAs<VectorType>()) {
1697  unsigned N = VT->getNumElements();
1698 
1699  // The vec_step built-in functions that take a 3-component
1700  // vector return 4. (OpenCL 1.1 spec 6.11.12)
1701  if (N == 3)
1702  N = 4;
1703 
1704  return this->emitConst(N, E);
1705  }
1706  return this->emitConst(1, E);
1707  }
1708 
1709  return false;
1710 }
1711 
1712 template <class Emitter>
1713 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitMemberExpr(const MemberExpr *E) {
1714  // 'Base.Member'
1715  const Expr *Base = E->getBase();
1716  const ValueDecl *Member = E->getMemberDecl();
1717 
1718  if (DiscardResult)
1719  return this->discard(Base);
1720 
1721  // MemberExprs are almost always lvalues, in which case we don't need to
1722  // do the load. But sometimes they aren't.
1723  const auto maybeLoadValue = [&]() -> bool {
1724  if (E->isGLValue())
1725  return true;
1726  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(E))
1727  return this->emitLoadPop(*T, E);
1728  return false;
1729  };
1730 
1731  if (const auto *VD = dyn_cast<VarDecl>(Member)) {
1732  // I am almost confident in saying that a var decl must be static
1733  // and therefore registered as a global variable. But this will probably
1734  // turn out to be wrong some time in the future, as always.
1735  if (auto GlobalIndex = P.getGlobal(VD))
1736  return this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*GlobalIndex, E) && maybeLoadValue();
1737  return false;
1738  }
1739 
1740  if (!isa<FieldDecl>(Member))
1741  return this->discard(Base) && this->visitDeclRef(Member, E);
1742 
1743  if (Initializing) {
1744  if (!this->delegate(Base))
1745  return false;
1746  } else {
1747  if (!this->visit(Base))
1748  return false;
1749  }
1750 
1751  // Base above gives us a pointer on the stack.
1752  const auto *FD = cast<FieldDecl>(Member);
1753  const RecordDecl *RD = FD->getParent();
1754  const Record *R = getRecord(RD);
1755  if (!R)
1756  return false;
1757  const Record::Field *F = R->getField(FD);
1758  // Leave a pointer to the field on the stack.
1759  if (F->Decl->getType()->isReferenceType())
1760  return this->emitGetFieldPop(PT_Ptr, F->Offset, E) && maybeLoadValue();
1761  return this->emitGetPtrFieldPop(F->Offset, E) && maybeLoadValue();
1762 }
1763 
1764 template <class Emitter>
1765 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitArrayInitIndexExpr(const ArrayInitIndexExpr *E) {
1766  // ArrayIndex might not be set if a ArrayInitIndexExpr is being evaluated
1767  // stand-alone, e.g. via EvaluateAsInt().
1768  if (!ArrayIndex)
1769  return false;
1770  return this->emitConst(*ArrayIndex, E);
1771 }
1772 
1773 template <class Emitter>
1774 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitArrayInitLoopExpr(const ArrayInitLoopExpr *E) {
1775  assert(Initializing);
1776  assert(!DiscardResult);
1777 
1778  // We visit the common opaque expression here once so we have its value
1779  // cached.
1780  if (!this->discard(E->getCommonExpr()))
1781  return false;
1782 
1783  // TODO: This compiles to quite a lot of bytecode if the array is larger.
1784  // Investigate compiling this to a loop.
1785  const Expr *SubExpr = E->getSubExpr();
1786  size_t Size = E->getArraySize().getZExtValue();
1787 
1788  // So, every iteration, we execute an assignment here
1789  // where the LHS is on the stack (the target array)
1790  // and the RHS is our SubExpr.
1791  for (size_t I = 0; I != Size; ++I) {
1792  ArrayIndexScope<Emitter> IndexScope(this, I);
1793  BlockScope<Emitter> BS(this);
1794 
1795  if (!this->visitArrayElemInit(I, SubExpr))
1796  return false;
1797  if (!BS.destroyLocals())
1798  return false;
1799  }
1800  return true;
1801 }
1802 
1803 template <class Emitter>
1804 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitOpaqueValueExpr(const OpaqueValueExpr *E) {
1805  const Expr *SourceExpr = E->getSourceExpr();
1806  if (!SourceExpr)
1807  return false;
1808 
1809  if (Initializing)
1810  return this->visitInitializer(SourceExpr);
1811 
1812  PrimType SubExprT = classify(SourceExpr).value_or(PT_Ptr);
1813  if (auto It = OpaqueExprs.find(E); It != OpaqueExprs.end())
1814  return this->emitGetLocal(SubExprT, It->second, E);
1815 
1816  if (!this->visit(SourceExpr))
1817  return false;
1818 
1819  // At this point we either have the evaluated source expression or a pointer
1820  // to an object on the stack. We want to create a local variable that stores
1821  // this value.
1822  unsigned LocalIndex = allocateLocalPrimitive(E, SubExprT, /*IsConst=*/true);
1823  if (!this->emitSetLocal(SubExprT, LocalIndex, E))
1824  return false;
1825 
1826  // Here the local variable is created but the value is removed from the stack,
1827  // so we put it back if the caller needs it.
1828  if (!DiscardResult) {
1829  if (!this->emitGetLocal(SubExprT, LocalIndex, E))
1830  return false;
1831  }
1832 
1833  // This is cleaned up when the local variable is destroyed.
1834  OpaqueExprs.insert({E, LocalIndex});
1835 
1836  return true;
1837 }
1838 
1839 template <class Emitter>
1840 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitAbstractConditionalOperator(
1841  const AbstractConditionalOperator *E) {
1842  const Expr *Condition = E->getCond();
1843  const Expr *TrueExpr = E->getTrueExpr();
1844  const Expr *FalseExpr = E->getFalseExpr();
1845 
1846  LabelTy LabelEnd = this->getLabel(); // Label after the operator.
1847  LabelTy LabelFalse = this->getLabel(); // Label for the false expr.
1848 
1849  if (!this->visitBool(Condition))
1850  return false;
1851 
1852  if (!this->jumpFalse(LabelFalse))
1853  return false;
1854 
1855  if (!this->delegate(TrueExpr))
1856  return false;
1857  if (!this->jump(LabelEnd))
1858  return false;
1859 
1860  this->emitLabel(LabelFalse);
1861 
1862  if (!this->delegate(FalseExpr))
1863  return false;
1864 
1865  this->fallthrough(LabelEnd);
1866  this->emitLabel(LabelEnd);
1867 
1868  return true;
1869 }
1870 
1871 template <class Emitter>
1872 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitStringLiteral(const StringLiteral *E) {
1873  if (DiscardResult)
1874  return true;
1875 
1876  if (!Initializing) {
1877  unsigned StringIndex = P.createGlobalString(E);
1878  return this->emitGetPtrGlobal(StringIndex, E);
1879  }
1880 
1881  // We are initializing an array on the stack.
1882  const ConstantArrayType *CAT =
1883  Ctx.getASTContext().getAsConstantArrayType(E->getType());
1884  assert(CAT && "a string literal that's not a constant array?");
1885 
1886  // If the initializer string is too long, a diagnostic has already been
1887  // emitted. Read only the array length from the string literal.
1888  unsigned ArraySize = CAT->getZExtSize();
1889  unsigned N = std::min(ArraySize, E->getLength());
1890  size_t CharWidth = E->getCharByteWidth();
1891 
1892  for (unsigned I = 0; I != N; ++I) {
1893  uint32_t CodeUnit = E->getCodeUnit(I);
1894 
1895  if (CharWidth == 1) {
1896  this->emitConstSint8(CodeUnit, E);
1897  this->emitInitElemSint8(I, E);
1898  } else if (CharWidth == 2) {
1899  this->emitConstUint16(CodeUnit, E);
1900  this->emitInitElemUint16(I, E);
1901  } else if (CharWidth == 4) {
1902  this->emitConstUint32(CodeUnit, E);
1903  this->emitInitElemUint32(I, E);
1904  } else {
1905  llvm_unreachable("unsupported character width");
1906  }
1907  }
1908 
1909  // Fill up the rest of the char array with NUL bytes.
1910  for (unsigned I = N; I != ArraySize; ++I) {
1911  if (CharWidth == 1) {
1912  this->emitConstSint8(0, E);
1913  this->emitInitElemSint8(I, E);
1914  } else if (CharWidth == 2) {
1915  this->emitConstUint16(0, E);
1916  this->emitInitElemUint16(I, E);
1917  } else if (CharWidth == 4) {
1918  this->emitConstUint32(0, E);
1919  this->emitInitElemUint32(I, E);
1920  } else {
1921  llvm_unreachable("unsupported character width");
1922  }
1923  }
1924 
1925  return true;
1926 }
1927 
1928 template <class Emitter>
1929 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitObjCStringLiteral(const ObjCStringLiteral *E) {
1930  return this->delegate(E->getString());
1931 }
1932 
1933 template <class Emitter>
1934 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitObjCEncodeExpr(const ObjCEncodeExpr *E) {
1935  auto &A = Ctx.getASTContext();
1936  std::string Str;
1937  A.getObjCEncodingForType(E->getEncodedType(), Str);
1938  StringLiteral *SL =
1939  StringLiteral::Create(A, Str, StringLiteralKind::Ordinary,
1940  /*Pascal=*/false, E->getType(), E->getAtLoc());
1941  return this->delegate(SL);
1942 }
1943 
1944 template <class Emitter>
1945 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitSYCLUniqueStableNameExpr(
1946  const SYCLUniqueStableNameExpr *E) {
1947  if (DiscardResult)
1948  return true;
1949 
1950  assert(!Initializing);
1951 
1952  auto &A = Ctx.getASTContext();
1953  std::string ResultStr = E->ComputeName(A);
1954 
1955  QualType CharTy = A.CharTy.withConst();
1956  APInt Size(A.getTypeSize(A.getSizeType()), ResultStr.size() + 1);
1957  QualType ArrayTy = A.getConstantArrayType(CharTy, Size, nullptr,
1958  ArraySizeModifier::Normal, 0);
1959 
1960  StringLiteral *SL =
1961  StringLiteral::Create(A, ResultStr, StringLiteralKind::Ordinary,
1962  /*Pascal=*/false, ArrayTy, E->getLocation());
1963 
1964  unsigned StringIndex = P.createGlobalString(SL);
1965  return this->emitGetPtrGlobal(StringIndex, E);
1966 }
1967 
1968 template <class Emitter>
1969 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCharacterLiteral(const CharacterLiteral *E) {
1970  if (DiscardResult)
1971  return true;
1972  return this->emitConst(E->getValue(), E);
1973 }
1974 
1975 template <class Emitter>
1976 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitFloatCompoundAssignOperator(
1977  const CompoundAssignOperator *E) {
1978 
1979  const Expr *LHS = E->getLHS();
1980  const Expr *RHS = E->getRHS();
1981  QualType LHSType = LHS->getType();
1982  QualType LHSComputationType = E->getComputationLHSType();
1983  QualType ResultType = E->getComputationResultType();
1984  std::optional<PrimType> LT = classify(LHSComputationType);
1985  std::optional<PrimType> RT = classify(ResultType);
1986 
1987  assert(ResultType->isFloatingType());
1988 
1989  if (!LT || !RT)
1990  return false;
1991 
1992  PrimType LHST = classifyPrim(LHSType);
1993 
1994  // C++17 onwards require that we evaluate the RHS first.
1995  // Compute RHS and save it in a temporary variable so we can
1996  // load it again later.
1997  if (!visit(RHS))
1998  return false;
1999 
2000  unsigned TempOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(E, *RT, /*IsConst=*/true);
2001  if (!this->emitSetLocal(*RT, TempOffset, E))
2002  return false;
2003 
2004  // First, visit LHS.
2005  if (!visit(LHS))
2006  return false;
2007  if (!this->emitLoad(LHST, E))
2008  return false;
2009 
2010  // If necessary, convert LHS to its computation type.
2011  if (!this->emitPrimCast(LHST, classifyPrim(LHSComputationType),
2012  LHSComputationType, E))
2013  return false;
2014 
2015  // Now load RHS.
2016  if (!this->emitGetLocal(*RT, TempOffset, E))
2017  return false;
2018 
2019  llvm::RoundingMode RM = getRoundingMode(E);
2020  switch (E->getOpcode()) {
2021  case BO_AddAssign:
2022  if (!this->emitAddf(RM, E))
2023  return false;
2024  break;
2025  case BO_SubAssign:
2026  if (!this->emitSubf(RM, E))
2027  return false;
2028  break;
2029  case BO_MulAssign:
2030  if (!this->emitMulf(RM, E))
2031  return false;
2032  break;
2033  case BO_DivAssign:
2034  if (!this->emitDivf(RM, E))
2035  return false;
2036  break;
2037  default:
2038  return false;
2039  }
2040 
2041  if (!this->emitPrimCast(classifyPrim(ResultType), LHST, LHS->getType(), E))
2042  return false;
2043 
2044  if (DiscardResult)
2045  return this->emitStorePop(LHST, E);
2046  return this->emitStore(LHST, E);
2047 }
2048 
2049 template <class Emitter>
2050 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitPointerCompoundAssignOperator(
2051  const CompoundAssignOperator *E) {
2052  BinaryOperatorKind Op = E->getOpcode();
2053  const Expr *LHS = E->getLHS();
2054  const Expr *RHS = E->getRHS();
2055  std::optional<PrimType> LT = classify(LHS->getType());
2056  std::optional<PrimType> RT = classify(RHS->getType());
2057 
2058  if (Op != BO_AddAssign && Op != BO_SubAssign)
2059  return false;
2060 
2061  if (!LT || !RT)
2062  return false;
2063 
2064  if (!visit(LHS))
2065  return false;
2066 
2067  if (!this->emitLoad(*LT, LHS))
2068  return false;
2069 
2070  if (!visit(RHS))
2071  return false;
2072 
2073  if (Op == BO_AddAssign) {
2074  if (!this->emitAddOffset(*RT, E))
2075  return false;
2076  } else {
2077  if (!this->emitSubOffset(*RT, E))
2078  return false;
2079  }
2080 
2081  if (DiscardResult)
2082  return this->emitStorePopPtr(E);
2083  return this->emitStorePtr(E);
2084 }
2085 
2086 template <class Emitter>
2087 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCompoundAssignOperator(
2088  const CompoundAssignOperator *E) {
2089 
2090  const Expr *LHS = E->getLHS();
2091  const Expr *RHS = E->getRHS();
2092  std::optional<PrimType> LHSComputationT =
2093  classify(E->getComputationLHSType());
2094  std::optional<PrimType> LT = classify(LHS->getType());
2095  std::optional<PrimType> RT = classify(RHS->getType());
2096  std::optional<PrimType> ResultT = classify(E->getType());
2097 
2098  if (!Ctx.getLangOpts().CPlusPlus14)
2099  return this->visit(RHS) && this->visit(LHS) && this->emitError(E);
2100 
2101  if (!LT || !RT || !ResultT || !LHSComputationT)
2102  return false;
2103 
2104  // Handle floating point operations separately here, since they
2105  // require special care.
2106 
2107  if (ResultT == PT_Float || RT == PT_Float)
2108  return VisitFloatCompoundAssignOperator(E);
2109 
2110  if (E->getType()->isPointerType())
2111  return VisitPointerCompoundAssignOperator(E);
2112 
2113  assert(!E->getType()->isPointerType() && "Handled above");
2114  assert(!E->getType()->isFloatingType() && "Handled above");
2115 
2116  // C++17 onwards require that we evaluate the RHS first.
2117  // Compute RHS and save it in a temporary variable so we can
2118  // load it again later.
2119  // FIXME: Compound assignments are unsequenced in C, so we might
2120  // have to figure out how to reject them.
2121  if (!visit(RHS))
2122  return false;
2123 
2124  unsigned TempOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(E, *RT, /*IsConst=*/true);
2125 
2126  if (!this->emitSetLocal(*RT, TempOffset, E))
2127  return false;
2128 
2129  // Get LHS pointer, load its value and cast it to the
2130  // computation type if necessary.
2131  if (!visit(LHS))
2132  return false;
2133  if (!this->emitLoad(*LT, E))
2134  return false;
2135  if (LT != LHSComputationT) {
2136  if (!this->emitCast(*LT, *LHSComputationT, E))
2137  return false;
2138  }
2139 
2140  // Get the RHS value on the stack.
2141  if (!this->emitGetLocal(*RT, TempOffset, E))
2142  return false;
2143 
2144  // Perform operation.
2145  switch (E->getOpcode()) {
2146  case BO_AddAssign:
2147  if (!this->emitAdd(*LHSComputationT, E))
2148  return false;
2149  break;
2150  case BO_SubAssign:
2151  if (!this->emitSub(*LHSComputationT, E))
2152  return false;
2153  break;
2154  case BO_MulAssign:
2155  if (!this->emitMul(*LHSComputationT, E))
2156  return false;
2157  break;
2158  case BO_DivAssign:
2159  if (!this->emitDiv(*LHSComputationT, E))
2160  return false;
2161  break;
2162  case BO_RemAssign:
2163  if (!this->emitRem(*LHSComputationT, E))
2164  return false;
2165  break;
2166  case BO_ShlAssign:
2167  if (!this->emitShl(*LHSComputationT, *RT, E))
2168  return false;
2169  break;
2170  case BO_ShrAssign:
2171  if (!this->emitShr(*LHSComputationT, *RT, E))
2172  return false;
2173  break;
2174  case BO_AndAssign:
2175  if (!this->emitBitAnd(*LHSComputationT, E))
2176  return false;
2177  break;
2178  case BO_XorAssign:
2179  if (!this->emitBitXor(*LHSComputationT, E))
2180  return false;
2181  break;
2182  case BO_OrAssign:
2183  if (!this->emitBitOr(*LHSComputationT, E))
2184  return false;
2185  break;
2186  default:
2187  llvm_unreachable("Unimplemented compound assign operator");
2188  }
2189 
2190  // And now cast from LHSComputationT to ResultT.
2191  if (ResultT != LHSComputationT) {
2192  if (!this->emitCast(*LHSComputationT, *ResultT, E))
2193  return false;
2194  }
2195 
2196  // And store the result in LHS.
2197  if (DiscardResult) {
2198  if (LHS->refersToBitField())
2199  return this->emitStoreBitFieldPop(*ResultT, E);
2200  return this->emitStorePop(*ResultT, E);
2201  }
2202  if (LHS->refersToBitField())
2203  return this->emitStoreBitField(*ResultT, E);
2204  return this->emitStore(*ResultT, E);
2205 }
2206 
2207 template <class Emitter>
2208 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitExprWithCleanups(const ExprWithCleanups *E) {
2209  LocalScope<Emitter> ES(this);
2210  const Expr *SubExpr = E->getSubExpr();
2211 
2212  assert(E->getNumObjects() == 0 && "TODO: Implement cleanups");
2213 
2214  return this->delegate(SubExpr) && ES.destroyLocals();
2215 }
2216 
2217 template <class Emitter>
2218 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitMaterializeTemporaryExpr(
2219  const MaterializeTemporaryExpr *E) {
2220  const Expr *SubExpr = E->getSubExpr();
2221 
2222  if (Initializing) {
2223  // We already have a value, just initialize that.
2224  return this->delegate(SubExpr);
2225  }
2226  // If we don't end up using the materialized temporary anyway, don't
2227  // bother creating it.
2228  if (DiscardResult)
2229  return this->discard(SubExpr);
2230 
2231  // When we're initializing a global variable *or* the storage duration of
2232  // the temporary is explicitly static, create a global variable.
2233  std::optional<PrimType> SubExprT = classify(SubExpr);
2234  bool IsStatic = E->getStorageDuration() == SD_Static;
2235  if (GlobalDecl || IsStatic) {
2236  std::optional<unsigned> GlobalIndex = P.createGlobal(E);
2237  if (!GlobalIndex)
2238  return false;
2239 
2240  const LifetimeExtendedTemporaryDecl *TempDecl =
2241  E->getLifetimeExtendedTemporaryDecl();
2242  if (IsStatic)
2243  assert(TempDecl);
2244 
2245  if (SubExprT) {
2246  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
2247  return false;
2248  if (IsStatic) {
2249  if (!this->emitInitGlobalTemp(*SubExprT, *GlobalIndex, TempDecl, E))
2250  return false;
2251  } else {
2252  if (!this->emitInitGlobal(*SubExprT, *GlobalIndex, E))
2253  return false;
2254  }
2255  return this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*GlobalIndex, E);
2256  }
2257 
2258  // Non-primitive values.
2259  if (!this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*GlobalIndex, E))
2260  return false;
2261  if (!this->visitInitializer(SubExpr))
2262  return false;
2263  if (IsStatic)
2264  return this->emitInitGlobalTempComp(TempDecl, E);
2265  return true;
2266  }
2267 
2268  // For everyhing else, use local variables.
2269  if (SubExprT) {
2270  unsigned LocalIndex = allocateLocalPrimitive(
2271  SubExpr, *SubExprT, /*IsConst=*/true, /*IsExtended=*/true);
2272  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
2273  return false;
2274  if (!this->emitSetLocal(*SubExprT, LocalIndex, E))
2275  return false;
2276  return this->emitGetPtrLocal(LocalIndex, E);
2277  } else {
2278  const Expr *Inner = E->getSubExpr()->skipRValueSubobjectAdjustments();
2279  if (std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex =
2280  allocateLocal(Inner, E->getExtendingDecl())) {
2281  InitLinkScope<Emitter> ILS(this, InitLink::Temp(*LocalIndex));
2282  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E))
2283  return false;
2284  return this->visitInitializer(SubExpr);
2285  }
2286  }
2287  return false;
2288 }
2289 
2290 template <class Emitter>
2291 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXBindTemporaryExpr(
2292  const CXXBindTemporaryExpr *E) {
2293  return this->delegate(E->getSubExpr());
2294 }
2295 
2296 template <class Emitter>
2297 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCompoundLiteralExpr(const CompoundLiteralExpr *E) {
2298  const Expr *Init = E->getInitializer();
2299  if (Initializing) {
2300  // We already have a value, just initialize that.
2301  return this->visitInitializer(Init) && this->emitFinishInit(E);
2302  }
2303 
2304  std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(E->getType());
2305  if (E->isFileScope()) {
2306  // Avoid creating a variable if this is a primitive RValue anyway.
2307  if (T && !E->isLValue())
2308  return this->delegate(Init);
2309 
2310  if (std::optional<unsigned> GlobalIndex = P.createGlobal(E)) {
2311  if (!this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*GlobalIndex, E))
2312  return false;
2313 
2314  if (T) {
2315  if (!this->visit(Init))
2316  return false;
2317  return this->emitInitGlobal(*T, *GlobalIndex, E);
2318  }
2319 
2320  return this->visitInitializer(Init) && this->emitFinishInit(E);
2321  }
2322 
2323  return false;
2324  }
2325 
2326  // Otherwise, use a local variable.
2327  if (T && !E->isLValue()) {
2328  // For primitive types, we just visit the initializer.
2329  return this->delegate(Init);
2330  } else {
2331  unsigned LocalIndex;
2332 
2333  if (T)
2334  LocalIndex = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(Init, *T, false, false);
2335  else if (std::optional<unsigned> MaybeIndex = this->allocateLocal(Init))
2336  LocalIndex = *MaybeIndex;
2337  else
2338  return false;
2339 
2340  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(LocalIndex, E))
2341  return false;
2342 
2343  if (T) {
2344  if (!this->visit(Init)) {
2345  return false;
2346  }
2347  return this->emitInit(*T, E);
2348  } else {
2349  if (!this->visitInitializer(Init) || !this->emitFinishInit(E))
2350  return false;
2351  }
2352 
2353  if (DiscardResult)
2354  return this->emitPopPtr(E);
2355  return true;
2356  }
2357 
2358  return false;
2359 }
2360 
2361 template <class Emitter>
2362 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitTypeTraitExpr(const TypeTraitExpr *E) {
2363  if (DiscardResult)
2364  return true;
2365  if (E->getType()->isBooleanType())
2366  return this->emitConstBool(E->getValue(), E);
2367  return this->emitConst(E->getValue(), E);
2368 }
2369 
2370 template <class Emitter>
2371 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitArrayTypeTraitExpr(const ArrayTypeTraitExpr *E) {
2372  if (DiscardResult)
2373  return true;
2374  return this->emitConst(E->getValue(), E);
2375 }
2376 
2377 template <class Emitter>
2378 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitLambdaExpr(const LambdaExpr *E) {
2379  if (DiscardResult)
2380  return true;
2381 
2382  assert(Initializing);
2383  const Record *R = P.getOrCreateRecord(E->getLambdaClass());
2384 
2385  auto *CaptureInitIt = E->capture_init_begin();
2386  // Initialize all fields (which represent lambda captures) of the
2387  // record with their initializers.
2388  for (const Record::Field &F : R->fields()) {
2389  const Expr *Init = *CaptureInitIt;
2390  ++CaptureInitIt;
2391 
2392  if (!Init)
2393  continue;
2394 
2395  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(Init)) {
2396  if (!this->visit(Init))
2397  return false;
2398 
2399  if (!this->emitInitField(*T, F.Offset, E))
2400  return false;
2401  } else {
2402  if (!this->emitGetPtrField(F.Offset, E))
2403  return false;
2404 
2405  if (!this->visitInitializer(Init))
2406  return false;
2407 
2408  if (!this->emitPopPtr(E))
2409  return false;
2410  }
2411  }
2412 
2413  return true;
2414 }
2415 
2416 template <class Emitter>
2417 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitPredefinedExpr(const PredefinedExpr *E) {
2418  if (DiscardResult)
2419  return true;
2420 
2421  return this->delegate(E->getFunctionName());
2422 }
2423 
2424 template <class Emitter>
2425 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXThrowExpr(const CXXThrowExpr *E) {
2426  if (E->getSubExpr() && !this->discard(E->getSubExpr()))
2427  return false;
2428 
2429  return this->emitInvalid(E);
2430 }
2431 
2432 template <class Emitter>
2433 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXReinterpretCastExpr(
2434  const CXXReinterpretCastExpr *E) {
2435  if (!this->discard(E->getSubExpr()))
2436  return false;
2437 
2438  return this->emitInvalidCast(CastKind::Reinterpret, E);
2439 }
2440 
2441 template <class Emitter>
2442 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXNoexceptExpr(const CXXNoexceptExpr *E) {
2443  assert(E->getType()->isBooleanType());
2444 
2445  if (DiscardResult)
2446  return true;
2447  return this->emitConstBool(E->getValue(), E);
2448 }
2449 
2450 template <class Emitter>
2451 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXConstructExpr(const CXXConstructExpr *E) {
2452  QualType T = E->getType();
2453  assert(!classify(T));
2454 
2455  if (T->isRecordType()) {
2456  const CXXConstructorDecl *Ctor = E->getConstructor();
2457 
2458  // Trivial copy/move constructor. Avoid copy.
2459  if (Ctor->isDefaulted() && Ctor->isCopyOrMoveConstructor() &&
2460  Ctor->isTrivial() &&
2461  E->getArg(0)->isTemporaryObject(Ctx.getASTContext(),
2462  T->getAsCXXRecordDecl()))
2463  return this->visitInitializer(E->getArg(0));
2464 
2465  // If we're discarding a construct expression, we still need
2466  // to allocate a variable and call the constructor and destructor.
2467  if (DiscardResult) {
2468  if (Ctor->isTrivial())
2469  return true;
2470  assert(!Initializing);
2471  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(E);
2472 
2473  if (!LocalIndex)
2474  return false;
2475 
2476  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E))
2477  return false;
2478  }
2479 
2480  // Zero initialization.
2481  if (E->requiresZeroInitialization()) {
2482  const Record *R = getRecord(E->getType());
2483 
2484  if (!this->visitZeroRecordInitializer(R, E))
2485  return false;
2486 
2487  // If the constructor is trivial anyway, we're done.
2488  if (Ctor->isTrivial())
2489  return true;
2490  }
2491 
2492  const Function *Func = getFunction(Ctor);
2493 
2494  if (!Func)
2495  return false;
2496 
2497  assert(Func->hasThisPointer());
2498  assert(!Func->hasRVO());
2499 
2500  // The This pointer is already on the stack because this is an initializer,
2501  // but we need to dup() so the call() below has its own copy.
2502  if (!this->emitDupPtr(E))
2503  return false;
2504 
2505  // Constructor arguments.
2506  for (const auto *Arg : E->arguments()) {
2507  if (!this->visit(Arg))
2508  return false;
2509  }
2510 
2511  if (Func->isVariadic()) {
2512  uint32_t VarArgSize = 0;
2513  unsigned NumParams = Func->getNumWrittenParams();
2514  for (unsigned I = NumParams, N = E->getNumArgs(); I != N; ++I) {
2515  VarArgSize +=
2516  align(primSize(classify(E->getArg(I)->getType()).value_or(PT_Ptr)));
2517  }
2518  if (!this->emitCallVar(Func, VarArgSize, E))
2519  return false;
2520  } else {
2521  if (!this->emitCall(Func, 0, E))
2522  return false;
2523  }
2524 
2525  // Immediately call the destructor if we have to.
2526  if (DiscardResult) {
2527  if (!this->emitRecordDestruction(getRecord(E->getType())))
2528  return false;
2529  if (!this->emitPopPtr(E))
2530  return false;
2531  }
2532  return true;
2533  }
2534 
2535  if (T->isArrayType()) {
2536  const ConstantArrayType *CAT =
2537  Ctx.getASTContext().getAsConstantArrayType(E->getType());
2538  if (!CAT)
2539  return false;
2540 
2541  size_t NumElems = CAT->getZExtSize();
2542  const Function *Func = getFunction(E->getConstructor());
2543  if (!Func || !Func->isConstexpr())
2544  return false;
2545 
2546  // FIXME(perf): We're calling the constructor once per array element here,
2547  // in the old intepreter we had a special-case for trivial constructors.
2548  for (size_t I = 0; I != NumElems; ++I) {
2549  if (!this->emitConstUint64(I, E))
2550  return false;
2551  if (!this->emitArrayElemPtrUint64(E))
2552  return false;
2553 
2554  // Constructor arguments.
2555  for (const auto *Arg : E->arguments()) {
2556  if (!this->visit(Arg))
2557  return false;
2558  }
2559 
2560  if (!this->emitCall(Func, 0, E))
2561  return false;
2562  }
2563  return true;
2564  }
2565 
2566  return false;
2567 }
2568 
2569 template <class Emitter>
2570 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitSourceLocExpr(const SourceLocExpr *E) {
2571  if (DiscardResult)
2572  return true;
2573 
2574  const APValue Val =
2575  E->EvaluateInContext(Ctx.getASTContext(), SourceLocDefaultExpr);
2576 
2577  // Things like __builtin_LINE().
2578  if (E->getType()->isIntegerType()) {
2579  assert(Val.isInt());
2580  const APSInt &I = Val.getInt();
2581  return this->emitConst(I, E);
2582  }
