2583  // Otherwise, the APValue is an LValue, with only one element.
2584  // Theoretically, we don't need the APValue at all of course.
2585  assert(E->getType()->isPointerType());
2586  assert(Val.isLValue());
2587  const APValue::LValueBase &Base = Val.getLValueBase();
2588  if (const Expr *LValueExpr = Base.dyn_cast<const Expr *>())
2589  return this->visit(LValueExpr);
2590 
2591  // Otherwise, we have a decl (which is the case for
2592  // __builtin_source_location).
2593  assert(Base.is<const ValueDecl *>());
2594  assert(Val.getLValuePath().size() == 0);
2595  const auto *BaseDecl = Base.dyn_cast<const ValueDecl *>();
2596  assert(BaseDecl);
2597 
2598  auto *UGCD = cast<UnnamedGlobalConstantDecl>(BaseDecl);
2599 
2600  std::optional<unsigned> GlobalIndex = P.getOrCreateGlobal(UGCD);
2601  if (!GlobalIndex)
2602  return false;
2603 
2604  if (!this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*GlobalIndex, E))
2605  return false;
2606 
2607  const Record *R = getRecord(E->getType());
2608  const APValue &V = UGCD->getValue();
2609  for (unsigned I = 0, N = R->getNumFields(); I != N; ++I) {
2610  const Record::Field *F = R->getField(I);
2611  const APValue &FieldValue = V.getStructField(I);
2612 
2613  PrimType FieldT = classifyPrim(F->Decl->getType());
2614 
2615  if (!this->visitAPValue(FieldValue, FieldT, E))
2616  return false;
2617  if (!this->emitInitField(FieldT, F->Offset, E))
2618  return false;
2619  }
2620 
2621  // Leave the pointer to the global on the stack.
2622  return true;
2623 }
2624 
2625 template <class Emitter>
2626 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitOffsetOfExpr(const OffsetOfExpr *E) {
2627  unsigned N = E->getNumComponents();
2628  if (N == 0)
2629  return false;
2630 
2631  for (unsigned I = 0; I != N; ++I) {
2632  const OffsetOfNode &Node = E->getComponent(I);
2633  if (Node.getKind() == OffsetOfNode::Array) {
2634  const Expr *ArrayIndexExpr = E->getIndexExpr(Node.getArrayExprIndex());
2635  PrimType IndexT = classifyPrim(ArrayIndexExpr->getType());
2636 
2637  if (DiscardResult) {
2638  if (!this->discard(ArrayIndexExpr))
2639  return false;
2640  continue;
2641  }
2642 
2643  if (!this->visit(ArrayIndexExpr))
2644  return false;
2645  // Cast to Sint64.
2646  if (IndexT != PT_Sint64) {
2647  if (!this->emitCast(IndexT, PT_Sint64, E))
2648  return false;
2649  }
2650  }
2651  }
2652 
2653  if (DiscardResult)
2654  return true;
2655 
2656  PrimType T = classifyPrim(E->getType());
2657  return this->emitOffsetOf(T, E, E);
2658 }
2659 
2660 template <class Emitter>
2661 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXScalarValueInitExpr(
2662  const CXXScalarValueInitExpr *E) {
2663  QualType Ty = E->getType();
2664 
2665  if (DiscardResult || Ty->isVoidType())
2666  return true;
2667 
2668  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(Ty))
2669  return this->visitZeroInitializer(*T, Ty, E);
2670 
2671  if (const auto *CT = Ty->getAs<ComplexType>()) {
2672  if (!Initializing) {
2673  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(E);
2674  if (!LocalIndex)
2675  return false;
2676  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E))
2677  return false;
2678  }
2679 
2680  // Initialize both fields to 0.
2681  QualType ElemQT = CT->getElementType();
2682  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(ElemQT);
2683 
2684  for (unsigned I = 0; I != 2; ++I) {
2685  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(ElemT, ElemQT, E))
2686  return false;
2687  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, I, E))
2688  return false;
2689  }
2690  return true;
2691  }
2692 
2693  if (const auto *VT = Ty->getAs<VectorType>()) {
2694  // FIXME: Code duplication with the _Complex case above.
2695  if (!Initializing) {
2696  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(E);
2697  if (!LocalIndex)
2698  return false;
2699  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E))
2700  return false;
2701  }
2702 
2703  // Initialize all fields to 0.
2704  QualType ElemQT = VT->getElementType();
2705  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(ElemQT);
2706 
2707  for (unsigned I = 0, N = VT->getNumElements(); I != N; ++I) {
2708  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(ElemT, ElemQT, E))
2709  return false;
2710  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, I, E))
2711  return false;
2712  }
2713  return true;
2714  }
2715 
2716  return false;
2717 }
2718 
2719 template <class Emitter>
2720 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitSizeOfPackExpr(const SizeOfPackExpr *E) {
2721  return this->emitConst(E->getPackLength(), E);
2722 }
2723 
2724 template <class Emitter>
2725 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitGenericSelectionExpr(
2726  const GenericSelectionExpr *E) {
2727  return this->delegate(E->getResultExpr());
2728 }
2729 
2730 template <class Emitter>
2731 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitChooseExpr(const ChooseExpr *E) {
2732  return this->delegate(E->getChosenSubExpr());
2733 }
2734 
2735 template <class Emitter>
2736 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitObjCBoolLiteralExpr(const ObjCBoolLiteralExpr *E) {
2737  if (DiscardResult)
2738  return true;
2739 
2740  return this->emitConst(E->getValue(), E);
2741 }
2742 
2743 template <class Emitter>
2744 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXInheritedCtorInitExpr(
2745  const CXXInheritedCtorInitExpr *E) {
2746  const CXXConstructorDecl *Ctor = E->getConstructor();
2747  assert(!Ctor->isTrivial() &&
2748  "Trivial CXXInheritedCtorInitExpr, implement. (possible?)");
2749  const Function *F = this->getFunction(Ctor);
2750  assert(F);
2751  assert(!F->hasRVO());
2752  assert(F->hasThisPointer());
2753 
2754  if (!this->emitDupPtr(SourceInfo{}))
2755  return false;
2756 
2757  // Forward all arguments of the current function (which should be a
2758  // constructor itself) to the inherited ctor.
2759  // This is necessary because the calling code has pushed the pointer
2760  // of the correct base for us already, but the arguments need
2761  // to come after.
2762  unsigned Offset = align(primSize(PT_Ptr)); // instance pointer.
2763  for (const ParmVarDecl *PD : Ctor->parameters()) {
2764  PrimType PT = this->classify(PD->getType()).value_or(PT_Ptr);
2765 
2766  if (!this->emitGetParam(PT, Offset, E))
2767  return false;
2768  Offset += align(primSize(PT));
2769  }
2770 
2771  return this->emitCall(F, 0, E);
2772 }
2773 
2774 template <class Emitter>
2775 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXNewExpr(const CXXNewExpr *E) {
2776  assert(classifyPrim(E->getType()) == PT_Ptr);
2777  const Expr *Init = E->getInitializer();
2778  QualType ElementType = E->getAllocatedType();
2779  std::optional<PrimType> ElemT = classify(ElementType);
2780  unsigned PlacementArgs = E->getNumPlacementArgs();
2781  bool IsNoThrow = false;
2782 
2783  // FIXME: Better diagnostic. diag::note_constexpr_new_placement
2784  if (PlacementArgs != 0) {
2785  // The only new-placement list we support is of the form (std::nothrow).
2786  //
2787  // FIXME: There is no restriction on this, but it's not clear that any
2788  // other form makes any sense. We get here for cases such as:
2789  //
2790  // new (std::align_val_t{N}) X(int)
2791  //
2792  // (which should presumably be valid only if N is a multiple of
2793  // alignof(int), and in any case can't be deallocated unless N is
2794  // alignof(X) and X has new-extended alignment).
2795  if (PlacementArgs != 1 || !E->getPlacementArg(0)->getType()->isNothrowT())
2796  return this->emitInvalid(E);
2797 
2798  if (!this->discard(E->getPlacementArg(0)))
2799  return false;
2800  IsNoThrow = true;
2801  }
2802 
2803  const Descriptor *Desc;
2804  if (ElemT) {
2805  if (E->isArray())
2806  Desc = nullptr; // We're not going to use it in this case.
2807  else
2808  Desc = P.createDescriptor(E, *ElemT, Descriptor::InlineDescMD,
2809  /*IsConst=*/false, /*IsTemporary=*/false,
2810  /*IsMutable=*/false);
2811  } else {
2812  Desc = P.createDescriptor(
2813  E, ElementType.getTypePtr(),
2814  E->isArray() ? std::nullopt : Descriptor::InlineDescMD,
2815  /*IsConst=*/false, /*IsTemporary=*/false, /*IsMutable=*/false, Init);
2816  }
2817 
2818  if (E->isArray()) {
2819  std::optional<const Expr *> ArraySizeExpr = E->getArraySize();
2820  if (!ArraySizeExpr)
2821  return false;
2822 
2823  const Expr *Stripped = *ArraySizeExpr;
2824  for (; auto *ICE = dyn_cast<ImplicitCastExpr>(Stripped);
2825  Stripped = ICE->getSubExpr())
2826  if (ICE->getCastKind() != CK_NoOp &&
2827  ICE->getCastKind() != CK_IntegralCast)
2828  break;
2829 
2830  PrimType SizeT = classifyPrim(Stripped->getType());
2831 
2832  if (!this->visit(Stripped))
2833  return false;
2834 
2835  if (ElemT) {
2836  // N primitive elements.
2837  if (!this->emitAllocN(SizeT, *ElemT, E, IsNoThrow, E))
2838  return false;
2839  } else {
2840  // N Composite elements.
2841  if (!this->emitAllocCN(SizeT, Desc, IsNoThrow, E))
2842  return false;
2843  }
2844 
2845  if (Init && !this->visitInitializer(Init))
2846  return false;
2847 
2848  } else {
2849  // Allocate just one element.
2850  if (!this->emitAlloc(Desc, E))
2851  return false;
2852 
2853  if (Init) {
2854  if (ElemT) {
2855  if (!this->visit(Init))
2856  return false;
2857 
2858  if (!this->emitInit(*ElemT, E))
2859  return false;
2860  } else {
2861  // Composite.
2862  if (!this->visitInitializer(Init))
2863  return false;
2864  }
2865  }
2866  }
2867 
2868  if (DiscardResult)
2869  return this->emitPopPtr(E);
2870 
2871  return true;
2872 }
2873 
2874 template <class Emitter>
2875 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXDeleteExpr(const CXXDeleteExpr *E) {
2876  const Expr *Arg = E->getArgument();
2877 
2878  // Arg must be an lvalue.
2879  if (!this->visit(Arg))
2880  return false;
2881 
2882  return this->emitFree(E->isArrayForm(), E);
2883 }
2884 
2885 template <class Emitter>
2886 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitExpressionTraitExpr(const ExpressionTraitExpr *E) {
2887  assert(Ctx.getLangOpts().CPlusPlus);
2888  return this->emitConstBool(E->getValue(), E);
2889 }
2890 
2891 template <class Emitter>
2892 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXUuidofExpr(const CXXUuidofExpr *E) {
2893  if (DiscardResult)
2894  return true;
2895  assert(!Initializing);
2896 
2897  const MSGuidDecl *GuidDecl = E->getGuidDecl();
2898  const RecordDecl *RD = GuidDecl->getType()->getAsRecordDecl();
2899  assert(RD);
2900  // If the definiton of the result type is incomplete, just return a dummy.
2901  // If (and when) that is read from, we will fail, but not now.
2902  if (!RD->isCompleteDefinition()) {
2903  if (std::optional<unsigned> I = P.getOrCreateDummy(GuidDecl))
2904  return this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*I, E);
2905  return false;
2906  }
2907 
2908  std::optional<unsigned> GlobalIndex = P.getOrCreateGlobal(GuidDecl);
2909  if (!GlobalIndex)
2910  return false;
2911  if (!this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*GlobalIndex, E))
2912  return false;
2913 
2914  assert(this->getRecord(E->getType()));
2915 
2916  const APValue &V = GuidDecl->getAsAPValue();
2917  if (V.getKind() == APValue::None)
2918  return true;
2919 
2920  assert(V.isStruct());
2921  assert(V.getStructNumBases() == 0);
2922  if (!this->visitAPValueInitializer(V, E))
2923  return false;
2924 
2925  return this->emitFinishInit(E);
2926 }
2927 
2928 template <class Emitter>
2929 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitRequiresExpr(const RequiresExpr *E) {
2930  assert(classifyPrim(E->getType()) == PT_Bool);
2931  if (DiscardResult)
2932  return true;
2933  return this->emitConstBool(E->isSatisfied(), E);
2934 }
2935 
2936 template <class Emitter>
2937 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitConceptSpecializationExpr(
2938  const ConceptSpecializationExpr *E) {
2939  assert(classifyPrim(E->getType()) == PT_Bool);
2940  if (DiscardResult)
2941  return true;
2942  return this->emitConstBool(E->isSatisfied(), E);
2943 }
2944 
2945 template <class Emitter>
2946 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXRewrittenBinaryOperator(
2947  const CXXRewrittenBinaryOperator *E) {
2948  return this->delegate(E->getSemanticForm());
2949 }
2950 
2951 template <class Emitter>
2952 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitPseudoObjectExpr(const PseudoObjectExpr *E) {
2953 
2954  for (const Expr *SemE : E->semantics()) {
2955  if (auto *OVE = dyn_cast<OpaqueValueExpr>(SemE)) {
2956  if (SemE == E->getResultExpr())
2957  return false;
2958 
2959  if (OVE->isUnique())
2960  continue;
2961 
2962  if (!this->discard(OVE))
2963  return false;
2964  } else if (SemE == E->getResultExpr()) {
2965  if (!this->delegate(SemE))
2966  return false;
2967  } else {
2968  if (!this->discard(SemE))
2969  return false;
2970  }
2971  }
2972  return true;
2973 }
2974 
2975 template <class Emitter>
2976 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitPackIndexingExpr(const PackIndexingExpr *E) {
2977  return this->delegate(E->getSelectedExpr());
2978 }
2979 
2980 template <class Emitter>
2981 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitRecoveryExpr(const RecoveryExpr *E) {
2982  return this->emitError(E);
2983 }
2984 
2985 template <class Emitter>
2986 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitAddrLabelExpr(const AddrLabelExpr *E) {
2987  assert(E->getType()->isVoidPointerType());
2988 
2989  unsigned Offset = allocateLocalPrimitive(
2990  E->getLabel(), PT_Ptr, /*IsConst=*/true, /*IsExtended=*/false);
2991 
2992  return this->emitGetLocal(PT_Ptr, Offset, E);
2993 }
2994 
2995 template <class Emitter>
2996 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitConvertVectorExpr(const ConvertVectorExpr *E) {
2997  assert(Initializing);
2998  const auto *VT = E->getType()->castAs<VectorType>();
2999  QualType ElemType = VT->getElementType();
3000  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(ElemType);
3001  const Expr *Src = E->getSrcExpr();
3002  PrimType SrcElemT =
3003  classifyPrim(Src->getType()->castAs<VectorType>()->getElementType());
3004 
3005  unsigned SrcOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(Src, PT_Ptr, true, false);
3006  if (!this->visit(Src))
3007  return false;
3008  if (!this->emitSetLocal(PT_Ptr, SrcOffset, E))
3009  return false;
3010 
3011  for (unsigned I = 0; I != VT->getNumElements(); ++I) {
3012  if (!this->emitGetLocal(PT_Ptr, SrcOffset, E))
3013  return false;
3014  if (!this->emitArrayElemPop(SrcElemT, I, E))
3015  return false;
3016  if (SrcElemT != ElemT) {
3017  if (!this->emitPrimCast(SrcElemT, ElemT, ElemType, E))
3018  return false;
3019  }
3020  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, I, E))
3021  return false;
3022  }
3023 
3024  return true;
3025 }
3026 
3027 template <class Emitter>
3028 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitShuffleVectorExpr(const ShuffleVectorExpr *E) {
3029  assert(Initializing);
3030  assert(E->getNumSubExprs() > 2);
3031 
3032  const Expr *Vecs[] = {E->getExpr(0), E->getExpr(1)};
3033  const VectorType *VT = Vecs[0]->getType()->castAs<VectorType>();
3034  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(VT->getElementType());
3035  unsigned NumInputElems = VT->getNumElements();
3036  unsigned NumOutputElems = E->getNumSubExprs() - 2;
3037  assert(NumOutputElems > 0);
3038 
3039  // Save both input vectors to a local variable.
3040  unsigned VectorOffsets[2];
3041  for (unsigned I = 0; I != 2; ++I) {
3042  VectorOffsets[I] = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(
3043  Vecs[I], PT_Ptr, /*IsConst=*/true, /*IsExtended=*/false);
3044  if (!this->visit(Vecs[I]))
3045  return false;
3046  if (!this->emitSetLocal(PT_Ptr, VectorOffsets[I], E))
3047  return false;
3048  }
3049  for (unsigned I = 0; I != NumOutputElems; ++I) {
3050  APSInt ShuffleIndex = E->getShuffleMaskIdx(Ctx.getASTContext(), I);
3051  if (ShuffleIndex == -1)
3052  return this->emitInvalid(E); // FIXME: Better diagnostic.
3053 
3054  assert(ShuffleIndex < (NumInputElems * 2));
3055  if (!this->emitGetLocal(PT_Ptr,
3056  VectorOffsets[ShuffleIndex >= NumInputElems], E))
3057  return false;
3058  unsigned InputVectorIndex = ShuffleIndex.getZExtValue() % NumInputElems;
3059  if (!this->emitArrayElemPop(ElemT, InputVectorIndex, E))
3060  return false;
3061 
3062  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, I, E))
3063  return false;
3064  }
3065 
3066  return true;
3067 }
3068 
3069 template <class Emitter>
3070 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitExtVectorElementExpr(
3071  const ExtVectorElementExpr *E) {
3072  const Expr *Base = E->getBase();
3073  assert(
3074  Base->getType()->isVectorType() ||
3075  Base->getType()->getAs<PointerType>()->getPointeeType()->isVectorType());
3076 
3077  SmallVector<uint32_t, 4> Indices;
3078  E->getEncodedElementAccess(Indices);
3079 
3080  if (Indices.size() == 1) {
3081  if (!this->visit(Base))
3082  return false;
3083 
3084  if (E->isGLValue()) {
3085  if (!this->emitConstUint32(Indices[0], E))
3086  return false;
3087  return this->emitArrayElemPtrPop(PT_Uint32, E);
3088  }
3089  // Else, also load the value.
3090  return this->emitArrayElemPop(classifyPrim(E->getType()), Indices[0], E);
3091  }
3092 
3093  // Create a local variable for the base.
3094  unsigned BaseOffset = allocateLocalPrimitive(Base, PT_Ptr, /*IsConst=*/true,
3095  /*IsExtended=*/false);
3096  if (!this->visit(Base))
3097  return false;
3098  if (!this->emitSetLocal(PT_Ptr, BaseOffset, E))
3099  return false;
3100 
3101  // Now the vector variable for the return value.
3102  if (!Initializing) {
3103  std::optional<unsigned> ResultIndex;
3104  ResultIndex = allocateLocal(E);
3105  if (!ResultIndex)
3106  return false;
3107  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*ResultIndex, E))
3108  return false;
3109  }
3110 
3111  assert(Indices.size() == E->getType()->getAs<VectorType>()->getNumElements());
3112 
3113  PrimType ElemT =
3114  classifyPrim(E->getType()->getAs<VectorType>()->getElementType());
3115  uint32_t DstIndex = 0;
3116  for (uint32_t I : Indices) {
3117  if (!this->emitGetLocal(PT_Ptr, BaseOffset, E))
3118  return false;
3119  if (!this->emitArrayElemPop(ElemT, I, E))
3120  return false;
3121  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, DstIndex, E))
3122  return false;
3123  ++DstIndex;
3124  }
3125 
3126  // Leave the result pointer on the stack.
3127  assert(!DiscardResult);
3128  return true;
3129 }
3130 
3131 template <class Emitter>
3132 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitObjCBoxedExpr(const ObjCBoxedExpr *E) {
3133  if (!E->isExpressibleAsConstantInitializer())
3134  return this->emitInvalid(E);
3135 
3136  return this->delegate(E->getSubExpr());
3137 }
3138 
3139 template <class Emitter>
3140 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXStdInitializerListExpr(
3141  const CXXStdInitializerListExpr *E) {
3142  const Expr *SubExpr = E->getSubExpr();
3143  const ConstantArrayType *ArrayType =
3144  Ctx.getASTContext().getAsConstantArrayType(SubExpr->getType());
3145  const Record *R = getRecord(E->getType());
3146  assert(Initializing);
3147  assert(SubExpr->isGLValue());
3148 
3149  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
3150  return false;
3151  if (!this->emitInitFieldPtr(R->getField(0u)->Offset, E))
3152  return false;
3153 
3154  PrimType SecondFieldT = classifyPrim(R->getField(1u)->Decl->getType());
3155  if (isIntegralType(SecondFieldT)) {
3156  if (!this->emitConst(static_cast<APSInt>(ArrayType->getSize()),
3157  SecondFieldT, E))
3158  return false;
3159  return this->emitInitField(SecondFieldT, R->getField(1u)->Offset, E);
3160  }
3161  assert(SecondFieldT == PT_Ptr);
3162 
3163  if (!this->emitGetFieldPtr(R->getField(0u)->Offset, E))
3164  return false;
3165  if (!this->emitConst(static_cast<APSInt>(ArrayType->getSize()), PT_Uint64, E))
3166  return false;
3167  if (!this->emitArrayElemPtrPop(PT_Uint64, E))
3168  return false;
3169  return this->emitInitFieldPtr(R->getField(1u)->Offset, E);
3170 }
3171 
3172 template <class Emitter>
3173 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitStmtExpr(const StmtExpr *E) {
3174  BlockScope<Emitter> BS(this);
3175  StmtExprScope<Emitter> SS(this);
3176 
3177  const CompoundStmt *CS = E->getSubStmt();
3178  const Stmt *Result = CS->getStmtExprResult();
3179  for (const Stmt *S : CS->body()) {
3180  if (S != Result) {
3181  if (!this->visitStmt(S))
3182  return false;
3183  continue;
3184  }
3185 
3186  assert(S == Result);
3187  if (const Expr *ResultExpr = dyn_cast<Expr>(S)) {
3188  if (DiscardResult)
3189  return this->discard(ResultExpr);
3190  return this->delegate(ResultExpr);
3191  }
3192 
3193  return this->visitStmt(S);
3194  }
3195 
3196  return BS.destroyLocals();
3197 }
3198 
3199 template <class Emitter> bool Compiler<Emitter>::discard(const Expr *E) {
3200  OptionScope<Emitter> Scope(this, /*NewDiscardResult=*/true,
3201  /*NewInitializing=*/false);
3202  return this->Visit(E);
3203 }
3204 
3205 template <class Emitter> bool Compiler<Emitter>::delegate(const Expr *E) {
3206  if (E->containsErrors())
3207  return this->emitError(E);
3208 
3209  // We're basically doing:
3210  // OptionScope<Emitter> Scope(this, DicardResult, Initializing);
3211  // but that's unnecessary of course.
3212  return this->Visit(E);
3213 }
3214 
3215 template <class Emitter> bool Compiler<Emitter>::visit(const Expr *E) {
3216  if (E->getType().isNull())
3217  return false;
3218 
3219  if (E->getType()->isVoidType())
3220  return this->discard(E);
3221 
3222  // Create local variable to hold the return value.
3223  if (!E->isGLValue() && !E->getType()->isAnyComplexType() &&
3224  !classify(E->getType())) {
3225  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(E);
3226  if (!LocalIndex)
3227  return false;
3228 
3229  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E))
3230  return false;
3231  return this->visitInitializer(E);
3232  }
3233 
3234  // Otherwise,we have a primitive return value, produce the value directly
3235  // and push it on the stack.
3236  OptionScope<Emitter> Scope(this, /*NewDiscardResult=*/false,
3237  /*NewInitializing=*/false);
3238  return this->Visit(E);
3239 }
3240 
3241 template <class Emitter>
3242 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitInitializer(const Expr *E) {
3243  assert(!classify(E->getType()));
3244 
3245  if (E->containsErrors())
3246  return this->emitError(E);
3247 
3248  OptionScope<Emitter> Scope(this, /*NewDiscardResult=*/false,
3249  /*NewInitializing=*/true);
3250  return this->Visit(E);
3251 }
3252 
3253 template <class Emitter> bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitBool(const Expr *E) {
3254  std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(E->getType());
3255  if (!T) {
3256  // Convert complex values to bool.
3257  if (E->getType()->isAnyComplexType()) {
3258  if (!this->visit(E))
3259  return false;
3260  return this->emitComplexBoolCast(E);
3261  }
3262  return false;
3263  }
3264 
3265  if (!this->visit(E))
3266  return false;
3267 
3268  if (T == PT_Bool)
3269  return true;
3270 
3271  // Convert pointers to bool.
3272  if (T == PT_Ptr || T == PT_FnPtr) {
3273  if (!this->emitNull(*T, nullptr, E))
3274  return false;
3275  return this->emitNE(*T, E);
3276  }
3277 
3278  // Or Floats.
3279  if (T == PT_Float)
3280  return this->emitCastFloatingIntegralBool(E);
3281 
3282  // Or anything else we can.
3283  return this->emitCast(*T, PT_Bool, E);
3284 }
3285 
3286 template <class Emitter>
3287 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitZeroInitializer(PrimType T, QualType QT,
3288  const Expr *E) {
3289  switch (T) {
3290  case PT_Bool:
3291  return this->emitZeroBool(E);
3292  case PT_Sint8:
3293  return this->emitZeroSint8(E);
3294  case PT_Uint8:
3295  return this->emitZeroUint8(E);
3296  case PT_Sint16:
3297  return this->emitZeroSint16(E);
3298  case PT_Uint16:
3299  return this->emitZeroUint16(E);
3300  case PT_Sint32:
3301  return this->emitZeroSint32(E);
3302  case PT_Uint32:
3303  return this->emitZeroUint32(E);
3304  case PT_Sint64:
3305  return this->emitZeroSint64(E);
3306  case PT_Uint64:
3307  return this->emitZeroUint64(E);
3308  case PT_IntAP:
3309  return this->emitZeroIntAP(Ctx.getBitWidth(QT), E);
3310  case PT_IntAPS:
3311  return this->emitZeroIntAPS(Ctx.getBitWidth(QT), E);
3312  case PT_Ptr:
3313  return this->emitNullPtr(nullptr, E);
3314  case PT_FnPtr:
3315  return this->emitNullFnPtr(nullptr, E);
3316  case PT_MemberPtr:
3317  return this->emitNullMemberPtr(nullptr, E);
3318  case PT_Float: {
3319  return this->emitConstFloat(APFloat::getZero(Ctx.getFloatSemantics(QT)), E);
3320  }
3321  }
3322  llvm_unreachable("unknown primitive type");
3323 }
3324 
3325 template <class Emitter>
3326 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitZeroRecordInitializer(const Record *R,
3327  const Expr *E) {
3328  assert(E);
3329  assert(R);
3330  // Fields
3331  for (const Record::Field &Field : R->fields()) {
3332  const Descriptor *D = Field.Desc;
3333  if (D->isPrimitive()) {
3334  QualType QT = D->getType();
3335  PrimType T = classifyPrim(D->getType());
3336  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(T, QT, E))
3337  return false;
3338  if (!this->emitInitField(T, Field.Offset, E))
3339  return false;
3340  continue;
3341  }
3342 
3343  if (!this->emitGetPtrField(Field.Offset, E))
3344  return false;
3345 
3346  if (D->isPrimitiveArray()) {
3347  QualType ET = D->getElemQualType();
3348  PrimType T = classifyPrim(ET);
3349  for (uint32_t I = 0, N = D->getNumElems(); I != N; ++I) {
3350  if (!this->visitZeroInitializer(T, ET, E))
3351  return false;
3352  if (!this->emitInitElem(T, I, E))
3353  return false;
3354  }
3355  } else if (D->isCompositeArray()) {
3356  const Record *ElemRecord = D->ElemDesc->ElemRecord;
3357  assert(D->ElemDesc->ElemRecord);
3358  for (uint32_t I = 0, N = D->getNumElems(); I != N; ++I) {
3359  if (!this->emitConstUint32(I, E))
3360  return false;
3361  if (!this->emitArrayElemPtr(PT_Uint32, E))
3362  return false;
3363  if (!this->visitZeroRecordInitializer(ElemRecord, E))
3364  return false;
3365  if (!this->emitPopPtr(E))
3366  return false;
3367  }
3368  } else if (D->isRecord()) {
3369  if (!this->visitZeroRecordInitializer(D->ElemRecord, E))
3370  return false;
3371  } else {
3372  assert(false);
3373  }
3374 
3375  if (!this->emitPopPtr(E))
3376  return false;
3377  }
3378 
3379  for (const Record::Base &B : R->bases()) {
3380  if (!this->emitGetPtrBase(B.Offset, E))
3381  return false;
3382  if (!this->visitZeroRecordInitializer(B.R, E))
3383  return false;
3384  if (!this->emitFinishInitPop(E))
3385  return false;
3386  }
3387 
3388  // FIXME: Virtual bases.
3389 
3390  return true;
3391 }
3392 
3393 template <class Emitter>
3394 template <typename T>
3395 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitConst(T Value, PrimType Ty, const Expr *E) {
3396  switch (Ty) {
3397  case PT_Sint8:
3398  return this->emitConstSint8(Value, E);
3399  case PT_Uint8:
3400  return this->emitConstUint8(Value, E);
3401  case PT_Sint16:
3402  return this->emitConstSint16(Value, E);
3403  case PT_Uint16:
3404  return this->emitConstUint16(Value, E);
3405  case PT_Sint32:
3406  return this->emitConstSint32(Value, E);
3407  case PT_Uint32:
3408  return this->emitConstUint32(Value, E);
3409  case PT_Sint64:
3410  return this->emitConstSint64(Value, E);
3411  case PT_Uint64:
3412  return this->emitConstUint64(Value, E);
3413  case PT_Bool:
3414  return this->emitConstBool(Value, E);
3415  case PT_Ptr:
3416  case PT_FnPtr:
3417  case PT_MemberPtr:
3418  case PT_Float:
3419  case PT_IntAP:
3420  case PT_IntAPS:
3421  llvm_unreachable("Invalid integral type");
3422  break;
3423  }
3424  llvm_unreachable("unknown primitive type");
3425 }
3426 
3427 template <class Emitter>
3428 template <typename T>
3429 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitConst(T Value, const Expr *E) {
3430  return this->emitConst(Value, classifyPrim(E->getType()), E);
3431 }
3432 
3433 template <class Emitter>
3434 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitConst(const APSInt &Value, PrimType Ty,
3435  const Expr *E) {
3436  if (Ty == PT_IntAPS)
3437  return this->emitConstIntAPS(Value, E);
3438  if (Ty == PT_IntAP)
3439  return this->emitConstIntAP(Value, E);
3440 
3441  if (Value.isSigned())
3442  return this->emitConst(Value.getSExtValue(), Ty, E);
3443  return this->emitConst(Value.getZExtValue(), Ty, E);
3444 }
3445 
3446 template <class Emitter>
3447 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitConst(const APSInt &Value, const Expr *E) {
3448  return this->emitConst(Value, classifyPrim(E->getType()), E);
3449 }
3450 
3451 template <class Emitter>
3452 unsigned Compiler<Emitter>::allocateLocalPrimitive(DeclTy &&Src, PrimType Ty,
3453  bool IsConst,
3454  bool IsExtended) {
3455  // Make sure we don't accidentally register the same decl twice.
3456  if (const auto *VD =
3457  dyn_cast_if_present<ValueDecl>(Src.dyn_cast<const Decl *>())) {
3458  assert(!P.getGlobal(VD));
3459  assert(!Locals.contains(VD));
3460  (void)VD;
3461  }
3462 
3463  // FIXME: There are cases where Src.is<Expr*>() is wrong, e.g.
3464  // (int){12} in C. Consider using Expr::isTemporaryObject() instead
3465  // or isa<MaterializeTemporaryExpr>().
3466  Descriptor *D = P.createDescriptor(Src, Ty, Descriptor::InlineDescMD, IsConst,
3467  Src.is<const Expr *>());
3468  Scope::Local Local = this->createLocal(D);
3469  if (auto *VD = dyn_cast_if_present<ValueDecl>(Src.dyn_cast<const Decl *>()))
3470  Locals.insert({VD, Local});
3471  VarScope->add(Local, IsExtended);
3472  return Local.Offset;
3473 }
3474 
3475 template <class Emitter>
3476 std::optional<unsigned>
3477 Compiler<Emitter>::allocateLocal(DeclTy &&Src, const ValueDecl *ExtendingDecl) {
3478  // Make sure we don't accidentally register the same decl twice.
3479  if ([[maybe_unused]] const auto *VD =
3480  dyn_cast_if_present<ValueDecl>(Src.dyn_cast<const Decl *>())) {
3481  assert(!P.getGlobal(VD));
3482  assert(!Locals.contains(VD));
3483  }
3484 
3485  QualType Ty;
3486  const ValueDecl *Key = nullptr;
3487  const Expr *Init = nullptr;
3488  bool IsTemporary = false;
3489  if (auto *VD = dyn_cast_if_present<ValueDecl>(Src.dyn_cast<const Decl *>())) {
3490  Key = VD;
3491  Ty = VD->getType();
3492 
3493  if (const auto *VarD = dyn_cast<VarDecl>(VD))
3494  Init = VarD->getInit();
3495  }
3496  if (auto *E = Src.dyn_cast<const Expr *>()) {
3497  IsTemporary = true;
3498  Ty = E->getType();
3499  }
3500 
3501  Descriptor *D = P.createDescriptor(
3502  Src, Ty.getTypePtr(), Descriptor::InlineDescMD, Ty.isConstQualified(),
3503  IsTemporary, /*IsMutable=*/false, Init);
3504  if (!D)
3505  return std::nullopt;
3506 
3507  Scope::Local Local = this->createLocal(D);
3508  if (Key)
3509  Locals.insert({Key, Local});
3510  if (ExtendingDecl)
3511  VarScope->addExtended(Local, ExtendingDecl);
3512  else
3513  VarScope->add(Local, false);
3514  return Local.Offset;
3515 }
3516 
3517 template <class Emitter>
3518 const RecordType *Compiler<Emitter>::getRecordTy(QualType Ty) {
3519  if (const PointerType *PT = dyn_cast<PointerType>(Ty))
3520  return PT->getPointeeType()->getAs<RecordType>();
3521  return Ty->getAs<RecordType>();
3522 }
3523 
3524 template <class Emitter> Record *Compiler<Emitter>::getRecord(QualType Ty) {
3525  if (const auto *RecordTy = getRecordTy(Ty))
3526  return getRecord(RecordTy->getDecl());
3527  return nullptr;
3528 }
3529 
3530 template <class Emitter>
3531 Record *Compiler<Emitter>::getRecord(const RecordDecl *RD) {
3532  return P.getOrCreateRecord(RD);
3533 }
3534 
3535 template <class Emitter>
3536 const Function *Compiler<Emitter>::getFunction(const FunctionDecl *FD) {
3537  return Ctx.getOrCreateFunction(FD);
3538 }
3539 
3540 template <class Emitter> bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitExpr(const Expr *E) {
3541  LocalScope<Emitter> RootScope(this);
3542  // Void expressions.
3543  if (E->getType()->isVoidType()) {
3544  if (!visit(E))
3545  return false;
3546  return this->emitRetVoid(E) && RootScope.destroyLocals();
3547  }
3548 
3549  // Expressions with a primitive return type.
3550  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(E)) {
3551  if (!visit(E))
3552  return false;
3553  return this->emitRet(*T, E) && RootScope.destroyLocals();
3554  }
3555 
3556  // Expressions with a composite return type.
3557  // For us, that means everything we don't
3558  // have a PrimType for.
3559  if (std::optional<unsigned> LocalOffset = this->allocateLocal(E)) {
3560  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalOffset, E))
3561  return false;
3562 
3563  if (!visitInitializer(E))
3564  return false;
3565 
3566  if (!this->emitFinishInit(E))
3567  return false;
3568  // We are destroying the locals AFTER the Ret op.
3569  // The Ret op needs to copy the (alive) values, but the
3570  // destructors may still turn the entire expression invalid.
3571  return this->emitRetValue(E) && RootScope.destroyLocals();
3572  }
3573 
3574  RootScope.destroyLocals();
3575  return false;
3576 }
3577 
3578 template <class Emitter>
3579 VarCreationState Compiler<Emitter>::visitDecl(const VarDecl *VD) {
3580 
3581  auto R = this->visitVarDecl(VD, /*Toplevel=*/true);
3582 
3583  if (R.notCreated())
3584  return R;
3585 
3586  if (R)
3587  return true;
3588 
3589  if (!R && Context::shouldBeGloballyIndexed(VD)) {
3590  if (auto GlobalIndex = P.getGlobal(VD)) {
3591  Block *GlobalBlock = P.getGlobal(*GlobalIndex);
3592  GlobalInlineDescriptor &GD =
3593  *reinterpret_cast<GlobalInlineDescriptor *>(GlobalBlock->rawData());
3594 
3595  GD.InitState = GlobalInitState::InitializerFailed;
3596  GlobalBlock->invokeDtor();
3597  }
3598  }
3599 
3600  return R;
3601 }
3602 
3603 /// Toplevel visitDeclAndReturn().
3604 /// We get here from evaluateAsInitializer().
3605 /// We need to evaluate the initializer and return its value.
3606 template <class Emitter>
3607 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitDeclAndReturn(const VarDecl *VD,
3608  bool ConstantContext) {
3609  std::optional<PrimType> VarT = classify(VD->getType());
3610 
3611  // We only create variables if we're evaluating in a constant context.
3612  // Otherwise, just evaluate the initializer and return it.
3613  if (!ConstantContext) {
3614  DeclScope<Emitter> LS(this, VD);
3615  if (!this->visit(VD->getAnyInitializer()))
3616  return false;
3617  return this->emitRet(VarT.value_or(PT_Ptr), VD) && LS.destroyLocals();
3618  }
3619 
3620  LocalScope<Emitter> VDScope(this, VD);
3621  if (!this->visitVarDecl(VD, /*Toplevel=*/true))
3622  return false;
3623 
3624  if (Context::shouldBeGloballyIndexed(VD)) {
3625  auto GlobalIndex = P.getGlobal(VD);
3626  assert(GlobalIndex); // visitVarDecl() didn't return false.
3627  if (VarT) {
3628  if (!this->emitGetGlobalUnchecked(*VarT, *GlobalIndex, VD))
3629  return false;
3630  } else {
3631  if (!this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*GlobalIndex, VD))
3632  return false;
3633  }
3634  } else {
3635  auto Local = Locals.find(VD);
3636  assert(Local != Locals.end()); // Same here.
3637  if (VarT) {
3638  if (!this->emitGetLocal(*VarT, Local->second.Offset, VD))
3639  return false;
3640  } else {
3641  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(Local->second.Offset, VD))
3642  return false;
3643  }
3644  }
3645 
3646  // Return the value.
3647  if (!this->emitRet(VarT.value_or(PT_Ptr), VD)) {
3648  // If the Ret above failed and this is a global variable, mark it as
3649  // uninitialized, even everything else succeeded.
3650  if (Context::shouldBeGloballyIndexed(VD)) {
3651  auto GlobalIndex = P.getGlobal(VD);
3652  assert(GlobalIndex);
3653  Block *GlobalBlock = P.getGlobal(*GlobalIndex);
3654  GlobalInlineDescriptor &GD =
3655  *reinterpret_cast<GlobalInlineDescriptor *>(GlobalBlock->rawData());
3656 
3657  GD.InitState = GlobalInitState::InitializerFailed;
3658  GlobalBlock->invokeDtor();
3659  }
3660  return false;
3661  }
3662 
3663  return VDScope.destroyLocals();
3664 }
3665 
3666 template <class Emitter>
3667 VarCreationState Compiler<Emitter>::visitVarDecl(const VarDecl *VD, bool Toplevel) {
3668  // We don't know what to do with these, so just return false.
3669  if (VD->getType().isNull())
3670  return false;
3671 
3672  // This case is EvalEmitter-only. If we won't create any instructions for the
3673  // initializer anyway, don't bother creating the variable in the first place.
3674  if (!this->isActive())
3675  return VarCreationState::NotCreated();
3676 
3677  const Expr *Init = VD->getInit();
3678  std::optional<PrimType> VarT = classify(VD->getType());
3679 
3680  if (Context::shouldBeGloballyIndexed(VD)) {
3681  auto checkDecl = [&]() -> bool {
3682  bool NeedsOp = !Toplevel && VD->isLocalVarDecl() && VD->isStaticLocal();
3683  return !NeedsOp || this->emitCheckDecl(VD, VD);
3684  };
3685 
3686  auto initGlobal = [&](unsigned GlobalIndex) -> bool {
3687  assert(Init);
3688  DeclScope<Emitter> LocalScope(this, VD);
3689 
3690  if (VarT) {
3691  if (!this->visit(Init))
3692  return checkDecl() && false;
3693 
3694  return checkDecl() && this->emitInitGlobal(*VarT, GlobalIndex, VD);
3695  }
3696 
3697  if (!checkDecl())
3698  return false;
3699 
3700  if (!this->emitGetPtrGlobal(GlobalIndex, Init))
3701  return false;
3702 
3703  if (!visitInitializer(Init))
3704  return false;
3705 
3706  if (!this->emitFinishInit(Init))
3707  return false;
3708 
3709  return this->emitPopPtr(Init);
3710  };
3711 
3712  // We've already seen and initialized this global.
3713  if (std::optional<unsigned> GlobalIndex = P.getGlobal(VD)) {
3714  if (P.getPtrGlobal(*GlobalIndex).isInitialized())
3715  return checkDecl();
3716 
3717  // The previous attempt at initialization might've been unsuccessful,
3718  // so let's try this one.
3719  return Init && checkDecl() && initGlobal(*GlobalIndex);
3720  }
3721 
3722  std::optional<unsigned> GlobalIndex = P.createGlobal(VD, Init);
3723 
3724  if (!GlobalIndex)
3725  return false;
3726 
3727  return !Init || (checkDecl() && initGlobal(*GlobalIndex));
3728  } else {
3729  InitLinkScope<Emitter> ILS(this, InitLink::Decl(VD));
3730 
3731  if (VarT) {
3732  unsigned Offset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(
3733  VD, *VarT, VD->getType().isConstQualified());
3734  if (Init) {
3735  // If this is a toplevel declaration, create a scope for the
3736  // initializer.
3737  if (Toplevel) {
3738  LocalScope<Emitter> Scope(this);
3739  if (!this->visit(Init))
3740  return false;
3741  return this->emitSetLocal(*VarT, Offset, VD) && Scope.destroyLocals();
3742  } else {
3743  if (!this->visit(Init))
3744  return false;
3745  return this->emitSetLocal(*VarT, Offset, VD);
3746  }
3747  }
3748  } else {
3749  if (std::optional<unsigned> Offset = this->allocateLocal(VD)) {
3750  if (!Init)
3751  return true;
3752 
3753  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*Offset, Init))
3754  return false;
3755 
3756  if (!visitInitializer(Init))
3757  return false;
3758 
3759  if (!this->emitFinishInit(Init))
3760  return false;
3761 
3762  return this->emitPopPtr(Init);
3763  }
3764  return false;
3765  }
3766  return true;
3767  }
3768 
3769  return false;
3770 }
3771 
3772 template <class Emitter>
3773 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitAPValue(const APValue &Val, PrimType ValType,
3774  const Expr *E) {
3775  assert(!DiscardResult);
3776  if (Val.isInt())
3777  return this->emitConst(Val.getInt(), ValType, E);
3778  else if (Val.isFloat())
3779  return this->emitConstFloat(Val.getFloat(), E);
3780 
3781  if (Val.isLValue()) {
3782  if (Val.isNullPointer())
3783  return this->emitNull(ValType, nullptr, E);
3784  APValue::LValueBase Base = Val.getLValueBase();
3785  if (const Expr *BaseExpr = Base.dyn_cast<const Expr *>())
3786  return this->visit(BaseExpr);
3787  else if (const auto *VD = Base.dyn_cast<const ValueDecl *>()) {
3788  return this->visitDeclRef(VD, E);
3789  }
3790  } else if (Val.isMemberPointer()) {
3791  if (const ValueDecl *MemberDecl = Val.getMemberPointerDecl())
3792  return this->emitGetMemberPtr(MemberDecl, E);
3793  return this->emitNullMemberPtr(nullptr, E);
3794  }
3795 
3796  return false;
3797 }
3798 
3799 template <class Emitter>
3800 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitAPValueInitializer(const APValue &Val,
3801  const Expr *E) {
3802 
3803  if (Val.isStruct()) {
3804  const Record *R = this->getRecord(E->getType());
3805  assert(R);
3806  for (unsigned I = 0, N = Val.getStructNumFields(); I != N; ++I) {
3807  const APValue &F = Val.getStructField(I);
3808  const Record::Field *RF = R->getField(I);
3809 
3810  if (F.isInt() || F.isFloat() || F.isLValue() || F.isMemberPointer()) {
3811  PrimType T = classifyPrim(RF->Decl->getType());
3812  if (!this->visitAPValue(F, T, E))
3813  return false;
3814  if (!this->emitInitField(T, RF->Offset, E))
3815  return false;
3816  } else if (F.isArray()) {
3817  assert(RF->Desc->isPrimitiveArray());
3818  const auto *ArrType = RF->Decl->getType()->getAsArrayTypeUnsafe();
3819  PrimType ElemT = classifyPrim(ArrType->getElementType());
3820  assert(ArrType);
3821 
3822  if (!this->emitGetPtrField(RF->Offset, E))
3823  return false;
3824 
3825  for (unsigned A = 0, AN = F.getArraySize(); A != AN; ++A) {
3826  if (!this->visitAPValue(F.getArrayInitializedElt(A), ElemT, E))
3827  return false;
3828  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, A, E))
3829  return false;
3830  }
3831 
3832  if (!this->emitPopPtr(E))
3833  return false;
3834  } else if (F.isStruct() || F.isUnion()) {
3835  if (!this->emitGetPtrField(RF->Offset, E))
3836  return false;
3837  if (!this->visitAPValueInitializer(F, E))
3838  return false;
3839  if (!this->emitPopPtr(E))
3840  return false;
3841  } else {
3842  assert(false && "I don't think this should be possible");
3843  }
3844  }
3845  return true;
3846  } else if (Val.isUnion()) {
3847  const FieldDecl *UnionField = Val.getUnionField();
3848  const Record *R = this->getRecord(UnionField->getParent());
3849  assert(R);
3850  const APValue &F = Val.getUnionValue();
3851  const Record::Field *RF = R->getField(UnionField);
3852  PrimType T = classifyPrim(RF->Decl->getType());
3853  if (!this->visitAPValue(F, T, E))
3854  return false;
3855  return this->emitInitField(T, RF->Offset, E);
3856  }
3857  // TODO: Other types.
3858 
3859  return false;
3860 }
3861 
3862 template <class Emitter>
3863 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitBuiltinCallExpr(const CallExpr *E) {
3864  const Function *Func = getFunction(E->getDirectCallee());
3865  if (!Func)
3866  return false;
3867 
3868  // For these, we're expected to ultimately return an APValue pointing
3869  // to the CallExpr. This is needed to get the correct codegen.
3870  unsigned Builtin = E->getBuiltinCallee();
3871  if (Builtin == Builtin::BI__builtin___CFStringMakeConstantString ||
3872  Builtin == Builtin::BI__builtin___NSStringMakeConstantString ||
3873  Builtin == Builtin::BI__builtin_ptrauth_sign_constant ||
3874  Builtin == Builtin::BI__builtin_function_start) {
3875  if (std::optional<unsigned> GlobalOffset = P.createGlobal(E)) {
3876  if (!this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*GlobalOffset, E))
3877  return false;
3878 
3879  if (PrimType PT = classifyPrim(E); PT != PT_Ptr && isPtrType(PT))
3880  return this->emitDecayPtr(PT_Ptr, PT, E);
3881  return true;
3882  }
3883  return false;
3884  }
3885 
3886  QualType ReturnType = E->getType();
3887  std::optional<PrimType> ReturnT = classify(E);
3888 
3889  // Non-primitive return type. Prepare storage.
3890  if (!Initializing && !ReturnT && !ReturnType->isVoidType()) {
3891  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(E);
3892  if (!LocalIndex)
3893  return false;
3894  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E))
3895  return false;
3896  }
3897 
3898  if (!Func->isUnevaluatedBuiltin()) {
3899  // Put arguments on the stack.
3900  for (const auto *Arg : E->arguments()) {
3901  if (!this->visit(Arg))
3902  return false;
3903  }
3904  }
3905 
3906  if (!this->emitCallBI(Func, E, E))
3907  return false;
3908 
3909  if (DiscardResult && !ReturnType->isVoidType()) {
3910  assert(ReturnT);
3911  return this->emitPop(*ReturnT, E);
3912  }
3913 
3914  return true;
3915 }
3916 
3917 template <class Emitter>
3918 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCallExpr(const CallExpr *E) {
3919  if (E->getBuiltinCallee())
3920  return VisitBuiltinCallExpr(E);
3921 
3922  QualType ReturnType = E->getCallReturnType(Ctx.getASTContext());
3923  std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(ReturnType);
3924  bool HasRVO = !ReturnType->isVoidType() && !T;
3925  const FunctionDecl *FuncDecl = E->getDirectCallee();
3926 
3927  if (HasRVO) {
3928  if (DiscardResult) {
3929  // If we need to discard the return value but the function returns its
3930  // value via an RVO pointer, we need to create one such pointer just
3931  // for this call.
3932  if (std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(E)) {
3933  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E))
3934  return false;
3935  }
3936  } else {
3937  // We need the result. Prepare a pointer to return or
3938  // dup the current one.
3939  if (!Initializing) {
3940  if (std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(E)) {
3941  if (!this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E))
3942  return false;
3943  }
3944  }
3945  if (!this->emitDupPtr(E))
3946  return false;
3947  }
3948  }
3949 
3950  auto Args = llvm::ArrayRef(E->getArgs(), E->getNumArgs());
3951  // Calling a static operator will still
3952  // pass the instance, but we don't need it.
3953  // Discard it here.
3954  if (isa<CXXOperatorCallExpr>(E)) {
3955  if (const auto *MD = dyn_cast_if_present<CXXMethodDecl>(FuncDecl);
3956  MD && MD->isStatic()) {
3957  if (!this->discard(E->getArg(0)))
3958  return false;
3959  Args = Args.drop_front();
3960  }
3961  }
3962 
3963  std::optional<unsigned> CalleeOffset;
3964  // Add the (optional, implicit) This pointer.
3965  if (const auto *MC = dyn_cast<CXXMemberCallExpr>(E)) {
3966  if (!FuncDecl && classifyPrim(E->getCallee()) == PT_MemberPtr) {
3967  // If we end up creating a CallPtr op for this, we need the base of the
3968  // member pointer as the instance pointer, and later extract the function
3969  // decl as the function pointer.
3970  const Expr *Callee = E->getCallee();
3971  CalleeOffset =
3972  this->allocateLocalPrimitive(Callee, PT_MemberPtr, true, false);
3973  if (!this->visit(Callee))
3974  return false;
3975  if (!this->emitSetLocal(PT_MemberPtr, *CalleeOffset, E))
3976  return false;
3977  if (!this->emitGetLocal(PT_MemberPtr, *CalleeOffset, E))
3978  return false;
3979  if (!this->emitGetMemberPtrBase(E))
3980  return false;
3981  } else if (!this->visit(MC->getImplicitObjectArgument())) {
3982  return false;
3983  }
3984  }
3985 
3986  llvm::BitVector NonNullArgs = collectNonNullArgs(FuncDecl, Args);
3987  // Put arguments on the stack.
3988  unsigned ArgIndex = 0;
3989  for (const auto *Arg : Args) {
3990  if (!this->visit(Arg))
3991  return false;
3992 
3993  // If we know the callee already, check the known parametrs for nullability.
3994  if (FuncDecl && NonNullArgs[ArgIndex]) {
3995  PrimType ArgT = classify(Arg).value_or(PT_Ptr);
3996  if (ArgT == PT_Ptr || ArgT == PT_FnPtr) {
3997  if (!this->emitCheckNonNullArg(ArgT, Arg))
3998  return false;
3999  }
4000  }
4001  ++ArgIndex;
4002  }
4003 
4004  if (FuncDecl) {
4005  const Function *Func = getFunction(FuncDecl);
4006  if (!Func)
4007  return false;
4008  assert(HasRVO == Func->hasRVO());
4009 
4010  bool HasQualifier = false;
4011  if (const auto *ME = dyn_cast<MemberExpr>(E->getCallee()))
4012  HasQualifier = ME->hasQualifier();
4013 
4014  bool IsVirtual = false;
4015  if (const auto *MD = dyn_cast<CXXMethodDecl>(FuncDecl))
4016  IsVirtual = MD->isVirtual();
4017 
4018  // In any case call the function. The return value will end up on the stack
4019  // and if the function has RVO, we already have the pointer on the stack to
4020  // write the result into.
4021  if (IsVirtual && !HasQualifier) {
4022  uint32_t VarArgSize = 0;
4023  unsigned NumParams =
4024  Func->getNumWrittenParams() + isa<CXXOperatorCallExpr>(E);
4025  for (unsigned I = NumParams, N = E->getNumArgs(); I != N; ++I)
4026  VarArgSize += align(primSize(classify(E->getArg(I)).value_or(PT_Ptr)));
4027 
4028  if (!this->emitCallVirt(Func, VarArgSize, E))
4029  return false;
4030  } else if (Func->isVariadic()) {
4031  uint32_t VarArgSize = 0;
4032  unsigned NumParams =
4033  Func->getNumWrittenParams() + isa<CXXOperatorCallExpr>(E);
4034  for (unsigned I = NumParams, N = E->getNumArgs(); I != N; ++I)
4035  VarArgSize += align(primSize(classify(E->getArg(I)).value_or(PT_Ptr)));
4036  if (!this->emitCallVar(Func, VarArgSize, E))
4037  return false;
4038  } else {
4039  if (!this->emitCall(Func, 0, E))
4040  return false;
4041  }
4042  } else {
4043  // Indirect call. Visit the callee, which will leave a FunctionPointer on
4044  // the stack. Cleanup of the returned value if necessary will be done after
4045  // the function call completed.
4046 
4047  // Sum the size of all args from the call expr.
4048  uint32_t ArgSize = 0;
4049  for (unsigned I = 0, N = E->getNumArgs(); I != N; ++I)
4050  ArgSize += align(primSize(classify(E->getArg(I)).value_or(PT_Ptr)));
4051 
4052  // Get the callee, either from a member pointer saved in CalleeOffset,
4053  // or by just visiting the Callee expr.
4054  if (CalleeOffset) {
4055  if (!this->emitGetLocal(PT_MemberPtr, *CalleeOffset, E))
4056  return false;
4057  if (!this->emitGetMemberPtrDecl(E))
4058  return false;
4059  if (!this->emitCallPtr(ArgSize, E, E))
4060  return false;
4061  } else {
4062  if (!this->visit(E->getCallee()))
4063  return false;
4064 
4065  if (!this->emitCallPtr(ArgSize, E, E))
4066  return false;
4067  }
4068  }
4069 
4070  // Cleanup for discarded return values.
4071  if (DiscardResult && !ReturnType->isVoidType() && T)
4072  return this->emitPop(*T, E);
4073 
4074  return true;
4075 }
4076 
4077 template <class Emitter>
4078 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXDefaultInitExpr(const CXXDefaultInitExpr *E) {
4079  SourceLocScope<Emitter> SLS(this, E);
4080 
4081  bool Old = InitStackActive;
4082  InitStackActive =
4083  !(E->getUsedContext()->getDeclKind() == Decl::CXXConstructor);
4084  bool Result = this->delegate(E->getExpr());
4085  InitStackActive = Old;
4086  return Result;
4087 }
4088 
4089 template <class Emitter>
4090 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXDefaultArgExpr(const CXXDefaultArgExpr *E) {
4091  SourceLocScope<Emitter> SLS(this, E);
4092 
4093  const Expr *SubExpr = E->getExpr();
4094  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(E->getExpr()))
4095  return this->visit(SubExpr);
4096 
4097  assert(Initializing);
4098  return this->visitInitializer(SubExpr);
4099 }
4100 
4101 template <class Emitter>
4102 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXBoolLiteralExpr(const CXXBoolLiteralExpr *E) {
4103  if (DiscardResult)
4104  return true;
4105 
4106  return this->emitConstBool(E->getValue(), E);
4107 }
4108 
4109 template <class Emitter>
4110 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXNullPtrLiteralExpr(
4111  const CXXNullPtrLiteralExpr *E) {
4112  if (DiscardResult)
4113  return true;
4114 
4115  return this->emitNullPtr(nullptr, E);
4116 }
4117 
4118 template <class Emitter>
4119 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitGNUNullExpr(const GNUNullExpr *E) {
4120  if (DiscardResult)
4121  return true;
4122 
4123  assert(E->getType()->isIntegerType());
4124 
4125  PrimType T = classifyPrim(E->getType());
4126  return this->emitZero(T, E);
4127 }
4128 
4129 template <class Emitter>
4130 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitCXXThisExpr(const CXXThisExpr *E) {
4131  if (DiscardResult)
4132  return true;
4133 
4134  if (this->LambdaThisCapture.Offset > 0) {
4135  if (this->LambdaThisCapture.IsPtr)
4136  return this->emitGetThisFieldPtr(this->LambdaThisCapture.Offset, E);
4137  return this->emitGetPtrThisField(this->LambdaThisCapture.Offset, E);
4138  }
4139 
4140  // In some circumstances, the 'this' pointer does not actually refer to the
4141  // instance pointer of the current function frame, but e.g. to the declaration
4142  // currently being initialized. Here we emit the necessary instruction(s) for
4143  // this scenario.
4144  if (InitStackActive && !InitStack.empty()) {
4145  unsigned StartIndex = 0;
4146  for (StartIndex = InitStack.size() - 1; StartIndex > 0; --StartIndex) {
4147  if (InitStack[StartIndex].Kind != InitLink::K_Field)
4148  break;
4149  }
4150 
4151  for (unsigned I = StartIndex, N = InitStack.size(); I != N; ++I) {
4152  if (!InitStack[I].template emit<Emitter>(this, E))
4153  return false;
4154  }
4155  return true;
4156  }
4157  return this->emitThis(E);
4158 }
4159 
4160 template <class Emitter> bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitStmt(const Stmt *S) {
4161  switch (S->getStmtClass()) {
4162  case Stmt::CompoundStmtClass:
4163  return visitCompoundStmt(cast<CompoundStmt>(S));
4164  case Stmt::DeclStmtClass:
4165  return visitDeclStmt(cast<DeclStmt>(S));
4166  case Stmt::ReturnStmtClass:
4167  return visitReturnStmt(cast<ReturnStmt>(S));
4168  case Stmt::IfStmtClass:
4169  return visitIfStmt(cast<IfStmt>(S));
4170  case Stmt::WhileStmtClass:
4171  return visitWhileStmt(cast<WhileStmt>(S));
4172  case Stmt::DoStmtClass:
4173  return visitDoStmt(cast<DoStmt>(S));
4174  case Stmt::ForStmtClass:
4175  return visitForStmt(cast<ForStmt>(S));
4176  case Stmt::CXXForRangeStmtClass:
4177  return visitCXXForRangeStmt(cast<CXXForRangeStmt>(S));
4178  case Stmt::BreakStmtClass:
4179  return visitBreakStmt(cast<BreakStmt>(S));
4180  case Stmt::ContinueStmtClass:
4181  return visitContinueStmt(cast<ContinueStmt>(S));
4182  case Stmt::SwitchStmtClass:
4183  return visitSwitchStmt(cast<SwitchStmt>(S));
4184  case Stmt::CaseStmtClass:
4185  return visitCaseStmt(cast<CaseStmt>(S));
4186  case Stmt::DefaultStmtClass:
4187  return visitDefaultStmt(cast<DefaultStmt>(S));
4188  case Stmt::AttributedStmtClass:
4189  return visitAttributedStmt(cast<AttributedStmt>(S));
4190  case Stmt::CXXTryStmtClass:
4191  return visitCXXTryStmt(cast<CXXTryStmt>(S));
4192  case Stmt::NullStmtClass:
4193  return true;
4194  // Always invalid statements.
4195  case Stmt::GCCAsmStmtClass:
4196  case Stmt::MSAsmStmtClass:
4197  case Stmt::GotoStmtClass:
4198  return this->emitInvalid(S);
4199  case Stmt::LabelStmtClass:
4200  return this->visitStmt(cast<LabelStmt>(S)->getSubStmt());
4201  default: {
4202  if (const auto *E = dyn_cast<Expr>(S))
4203  return this->discard(E);
4204  return false;
4205  }
4206  }
4207 }
4208 
4209 /// Visits the given statment without creating a variable
4210 /// scope for it in case it is a compound statement.
4211 template <class Emitter> bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitLoopBody(const Stmt *S) {
4212  if (isa<NullStmt>(S))
4213  return true;
4214 
4215  if (const auto *CS = dyn_cast<CompoundStmt>(S)) {
4216  for (const auto *InnerStmt : CS->body())
4217  if (!visitStmt(InnerStmt))
4218  return false;
4219  return true;
4220  }
4221 
4222  return this->visitStmt(S);
4223 }
4224 
4225 template <class Emitter>
4226 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitCompoundStmt(const CompoundStmt *S) {
4227  BlockScope<Emitter> Scope(this);
4228  for (const auto *InnerStmt : S->body())
4229  if (!visitStmt(InnerStmt))
4230  return false;
4231  return Scope.destroyLocals();
4232 }
4233 
4234 template <class Emitter>
4235 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitDeclStmt(const DeclStmt *DS) {
4236  for (const auto *D : DS->decls()) {
4237  if (isa<StaticAssertDecl, TagDecl, TypedefNameDecl, UsingEnumDecl,
4238  FunctionDecl>(D))
4239  continue;
4240 
4241  const auto *VD = dyn_cast<VarDecl>(D);
4242  if (!VD)
4243  return false;
4244  if (!this->visitVarDecl(VD))
4245  return false;
4246  }
4247 
4248  return true;
4249 }
4250 
4251 template <class Emitter>
4252 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitReturnStmt(const ReturnStmt *RS) {
4253  if (this->InStmtExpr)
4254  return this->emitUnsupported(RS);
4255 
4256  if (const Expr *RE = RS->getRetValue()) {
4257  LocalScope<Emitter> RetScope(this);
4258  if (ReturnType) {
4259  // Primitive types are simply returned.
4260  if (!this->visit(RE))
4261  return false;
4262  this->emitCleanup();
4263  return this->emitRet(*ReturnType, RS);
4264  } else if (RE->getType()->isVoidType()) {
4265  if (!this->visit(RE))
4266  return false;
4267  } else {
4268  // RVO - construct the value in the return location.
4269  if (!this->emitRVOPtr(RE))
4270  return false;
4271  if (!this->visitInitializer(RE))
4272  return false;
4273  if (!this->emitPopPtr(RE))
4274  return false;
4275 
4276  this->emitCleanup();
4277  return this->emitRetVoid(RS);
4278  }
4279  }
4280 
4281  // Void return.
4282  this->emitCleanup();
4283  return this->emitRetVoid(RS);
4284 }
4285 
4286 template <class Emitter> bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitIfStmt(const IfStmt *IS) {
4287  BlockScope<Emitter> IfScope(this);
4288 
4289  if (IS->isNonNegatedConsteval())
4290  return visitStmt(IS->getThen());
4291  if (IS->isNegatedConsteval())
4292  return IS->getElse() ? visitStmt(IS->getElse()) : true;
4293 
4294  if (auto *CondInit = IS->getInit())
4295  if (!visitStmt(CondInit))
4296  return false;
4297 
4298  if (const DeclStmt *CondDecl = IS->getConditionVariableDeclStmt())
4299  if (!visitDeclStmt(CondDecl))
4300  return false;
4301 
4302  if (!this->visitBool(IS->getCond()))
4303  return false;
4304 
4305  if (const Stmt *Else = IS->getElse()) {
4306  LabelTy LabelElse = this->getLabel();
4307  LabelTy LabelEnd = this->getLabel();
4308  if (!this->jumpFalse(LabelElse))
4309  return false;
4310  if (!visitStmt(IS->getThen()))
4311  return false;
4312  if (!this->jump(LabelEnd))
4313  return false;
4314  this->emitLabel(LabelElse);
4315  if (!visitStmt(Else))
4316  return false;
4317  this->emitLabel(LabelEnd);
4318  } else {
4319  LabelTy LabelEnd = this->getLabel();
4320  if (!this->jumpFalse(LabelEnd))
4321  return false;
4322  if (!visitStmt(IS->getThen()))
4323  return false;
4324  this->emitLabel(LabelEnd);
4325  }
4326 
4327  return IfScope.destroyLocals();
4328 }
4329 
4330 template <class Emitter>
4331 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitWhileStmt(const WhileStmt *S) {
4332  const Expr *Cond = S->getCond();
4333  const Stmt *Body = S->getBody();
4334 
4335  LabelTy CondLabel = this->getLabel(); // Label before the condition.
4336  LabelTy EndLabel = this->getLabel(); // Label after the loop.
4337  LoopScope<Emitter> LS(this, EndLabel, CondLabel);
4338 
4339  this->fallthrough(CondLabel);
4340  this->emitLabel(CondLabel);
4341 
4342  if (const DeclStmt *CondDecl = S->getConditionVariableDeclStmt())
4343  if (!visitDeclStmt(CondDecl))
4344  return false;
4345 
4346  if (!this->visitBool(Cond))
4347  return false;
4348  if (!this->jumpFalse(EndLabel))
4349  return false;
4350 
4351  LocalScope<Emitter> Scope(this);
4352  {
4353  DestructorScope<Emitter> DS(Scope);
4354  if (!this->visitLoopBody(Body))
4355  return false;
4356  }
4357 
4358  if (!this->jump(CondLabel))
4359  return false;
4360  this->emitLabel(EndLabel);
4361 
4362  return true;
4363 }
4364 
4365 template <class Emitter> bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitDoStmt(const DoStmt *S) {
4366  const Expr *Cond = S->getCond();
4367  const Stmt *Body = S->getBody();
4368 
4369  LabelTy StartLabel = this->getLabel();
4370  LabelTy EndLabel = this->getLabel();
4371  LabelTy CondLabel = this->getLabel();
4372  LoopScope<Emitter> LS(this, EndLabel, CondLabel);
4373  LocalScope<Emitter> Scope(this);
4374 
4375  this->fallthrough(StartLabel);
4376  this->emitLabel(StartLabel);
4377  {
4378  DestructorScope<Emitter> DS(Scope);
4379 
4380  if (!this->visitLoopBody(Body))
4381  return false;
4382  this->fallthrough(CondLabel);
4383  this->emitLabel(CondLabel);
4384  if (!this->visitBool(Cond))
4385  return false;
4386  }
4387  if (!this->jumpTrue(StartLabel))
4388  return false;
4389 
4390  this->fallthrough(EndLabel);
4391  this->emitLabel(EndLabel);
4392  return true;
4393 }
4394 
4395 template <class Emitter>
4396 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitForStmt(const ForStmt *S) {
4397  // for (Init; Cond; Inc) { Body }
4398  const Stmt *Init = S->getInit();
4399  const Expr *Cond = S->getCond();
4400  const Expr *Inc = S->getInc();
4401  const Stmt *Body = S->getBody();
4402 
4403  LabelTy EndLabel = this->getLabel();
4404  LabelTy CondLabel = this->getLabel();
4405  LabelTy IncLabel = this->getLabel();
4406  LoopScope<Emitter> LS(this, EndLabel, IncLabel);
4407  LocalScope<Emitter> Scope(this);
4408 
4409  if (Init && !this->visitStmt(Init))
4410  return false;
4411  this->fallthrough(CondLabel);
4412  this->emitLabel(CondLabel);
4413 
4414  if (const DeclStmt *CondDecl = S->getConditionVariableDeclStmt())
4415  if (!visitDeclStmt(CondDecl))
4416  return false;
4417 
4418  if (Cond) {
4419  if (!this->visitBool(Cond))
4420  return false;
4421  if (!this->jumpFalse(EndLabel))
4422  return false;
4423  }
4424 
4425  {
4426  DestructorScope<Emitter> DS(Scope);
4427 
4428  if (Body && !this->visitLoopBody(Body))
4429  return false;
4430  this->fallthrough(IncLabel);
4431  this->emitLabel(IncLabel);
4432  if (Inc && !this->discard(Inc))
4433  return false;
4434  }
4435 
4436  if (!this->jump(CondLabel))
4437  return false;
4438  this->fallthrough(EndLabel);
4439  this->emitLabel(EndLabel);
4440  return true;
4441 }
4442 
4443 template <class Emitter>
4444 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitCXXForRangeStmt(const CXXForRangeStmt *S) {
4445  const Stmt *Init = S->getInit();
4446  const Expr *Cond = S->getCond();
4447  const Expr *Inc = S->getInc();
4448  const Stmt *Body = S->getBody();
4449  const Stmt *BeginStmt = S->getBeginStmt();
4450  const Stmt *RangeStmt = S->getRangeStmt();
4451  const Stmt *EndStmt = S->getEndStmt();
4452  const VarDecl *LoopVar = S->getLoopVariable();
4453 
4454  LabelTy EndLabel = this->getLabel();
4455  LabelTy CondLabel = this->getLabel();
4456  LabelTy IncLabel = this->getLabel();
4457  LoopScope<Emitter> LS(this, EndLabel, IncLabel);
4458 
4459  // Emit declarations needed in the loop.
4460  if (Init && !this->visitStmt(Init))
4461  return false;
4462  if (!this->visitStmt(RangeStmt))
4463  return false;
4464  if (!this->visitStmt(BeginStmt))
4465  return false;
4466  if (!this->visitStmt(EndStmt))
4467  return false;
4468 
4469  // Now the condition as well as the loop variable assignment.
4470  this->fallthrough(CondLabel);
4471  this->emitLabel(CondLabel);
4472  if (!this->visitBool(Cond))
4473  return false;
4474  if (!this->jumpFalse(EndLabel))
4475  return false;
4476 
4477  if (!this->visitVarDecl(LoopVar))
4478  return false;
4479 
4480  // Body.
4481  LocalScope<Emitter> Scope(this);
4482  {
4483  DestructorScope<Emitter> DS(Scope);
4484 
4485  if (!this->visitLoopBody(Body))
4486  return false;
4487  this->fallthrough(IncLabel);
4488  this->emitLabel(IncLabel);
4489  if (!this->discard(Inc))
4490  return false;
4491  }
4492 
4493  if (!this->jump(CondLabel))
4494  return false;
4495 
4496  this->fallthrough(EndLabel);
4497  this->emitLabel(EndLabel);
4498  return true;
4499 }
4500 
4501 template <class Emitter>
4502 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitBreakStmt(const BreakStmt *S) {
4503  if (!BreakLabel)
4504  return false;
4505 
4506  this->VarScope->emitDestructors();
4507  return this->jump(*BreakLabel);
4508 }
4509 
4510 template <class Emitter>
4511 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitContinueStmt(const ContinueStmt *S) {
4512  if (!ContinueLabel)
4513  return false;
4514 
4515  this->VarScope->emitDestructors();
4516  return this->jump(*ContinueLabel);
4517 }
4518 
4519 template <class Emitter>
4520 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitSwitchStmt(const SwitchStmt *S) {
4521  const Expr *Cond = S->getCond();
4522  PrimType CondT = this->classifyPrim(Cond->getType());
4523 
4524  LabelTy EndLabel = this->getLabel();
4525  OptLabelTy DefaultLabel = std::nullopt;
4526  unsigned CondVar = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(Cond, CondT, true, false);
4527 
4528  if (const auto *CondInit = S->getInit())
4529  if (!visitStmt(CondInit))
4530  return false;
4531 
4532  if (const DeclStmt *CondDecl = S->getConditionVariableDeclStmt())
4533  if (!visitDeclStmt(CondDecl))
4534  return false;
4535 
4536  // Initialize condition variable.
4537  if (!this->visit(Cond))
4538  return false;
4539  if (!this->emitSetLocal(CondT, CondVar, S))
4540  return false;
4541 
4542  CaseMap CaseLabels;
4543  // Create labels and comparison ops for all case statements.
4544  for (const SwitchCase *SC = S->getSwitchCaseList(); SC;
4545  SC = SC->getNextSwitchCase()) {
4546  if (const auto *CS = dyn_cast<CaseStmt>(SC)) {
4547  // FIXME: Implement ranges.
4548  if (CS->caseStmtIsGNURange())
4549  return false;
4550  CaseLabels[SC] = this->getLabel();
4551 
4552  const Expr *Value = CS->getLHS();
4553  PrimType ValueT = this->classifyPrim(Value->getType());
4554 
4555  // Compare the case statement's value to the switch condition.
4556  if (!this->emitGetLocal(CondT, CondVar, CS))
4557  return false;
4558  if (!this->visit(Value))
4559  return false;
4560 
4561  // Compare and jump to the case label.
4562  if (!this->emitEQ(ValueT, S))
4563  return false;
4564  if (!this->jumpTrue(CaseLabels[CS]))
4565  return false;
4566  } else {
4567  assert(!DefaultLabel);
4568  DefaultLabel = this->getLabel();
4569  }
4570  }
4571 
4572  // If none of the conditions above were true, fall through to the default
4573  // statement or jump after the switch statement.
4574  if (DefaultLabel) {
4575  if (!this->jump(*DefaultLabel))
4576  return false;
4577  } else {
4578  if (!this->jump(EndLabel))
4579  return false;
4580  }
4581 
4582  SwitchScope<Emitter> SS(this, std::move(CaseLabels), EndLabel, DefaultLabel);
4583  if (!this->visitStmt(S->getBody()))
4584  return false;
4585  this->emitLabel(EndLabel);
4586  return true;
4587 }
4588 
4589 template <class Emitter>
4590 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitCaseStmt(const CaseStmt *S) {
4591  this->emitLabel(CaseLabels[S]);
4592  return this->visitStmt(S->getSubStmt());
4593 }
4594 
4595 template <class Emitter>
4596 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitDefaultStmt(const DefaultStmt *S) {
4597  this->emitLabel(*DefaultLabel);
4598  return this->visitStmt(S->getSubStmt());
4599 }
4600 
4601 template <class Emitter>
4602 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitAttributedStmt(const AttributedStmt *S) {
4603  if (this->Ctx.getLangOpts().CXXAssumptions &&
4604  !this->Ctx.getLangOpts().MSVCCompat) {
4605  for (const Attr *A : S->getAttrs()) {
4606  auto *AA = dyn_cast<CXXAssumeAttr>(A);
4607  if (!AA)
4608  continue;
4609 
4610  assert(isa<NullStmt>(S->getSubStmt()));
4611 
4612  const Expr *Assumption = AA->getAssumption();
4613  if (Assumption->isValueDependent())
4614  return false;
4615 
4616  if (Assumption->HasSideEffects(this->Ctx.getASTContext()))
4617  continue;
4618 
4619  // Evaluate assumption.
4620  if (!this->visitBool(Assumption))
4621  return false;
4622 
4623  if (!this->emitAssume(Assumption))
4624  return false;
4625  }
4626  }
4627 
4628  // Ignore other attributes.
4629  return this->visitStmt(S->getSubStmt());
4630 }
4631 
4632 template <class Emitter>
4633 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitCXXTryStmt(const CXXTryStmt *S) {
4634  // Ignore all handlers.
4635  return this->visitStmt(S->getTryBlock());
4636 }
4637 
4638 template <class Emitter>
4639 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitLambdaStaticInvokerBody(const CXXMethodDecl *MD) {
4640  assert(MD->isLambdaStaticInvoker());
4641  assert(MD->hasBody());
4642  assert(cast<CompoundStmt>(MD->getBody())->body_empty());
4643 
4644  const CXXRecordDecl *ClosureClass = MD->getParent();
4645  const CXXMethodDecl *LambdaCallOp = ClosureClass->getLambdaCallOperator();
4646  assert(ClosureClass->captures_begin() == ClosureClass->captures_end());
4647  const Function *Func = this->getFunction(LambdaCallOp);
4648  if (!Func)
4649  return false;
4650  assert(Func->hasThisPointer());
4651  assert(Func->getNumParams() == (MD->getNumParams() + 1 + Func->hasRVO()));
4652 
4653  if (Func->hasRVO()) {
4654  if (!this->emitRVOPtr(MD))
4655  return false;
4656  }
4657 
4658  // The lambda call operator needs an instance pointer, but we don't have
4659  // one here, and we don't need one either because the lambda cannot have
4660  // any captures, as verified above. Emit a null pointer. This is then
4661  // special-cased when interpreting to not emit any misleading diagnostics.
4662  if (!this->emitNullPtr(nullptr, MD))
4663  return false;
4664 
4665  // Forward all arguments from the static invoker to the lambda call operator.
4666  for (const ParmVarDecl *PVD : MD->parameters()) {
4667  auto It = this->Params.find(PVD);
4668  assert(It != this->Params.end());
4669 
4670  // We do the lvalue-to-rvalue conversion manually here, so no need
4671  // to care about references.
4672  PrimType ParamType = this->classify(PVD->getType()).value_or(PT_Ptr);
4673  if (!this->emitGetParam(ParamType, It->second.Offset, MD))
4674  return false;
4675  }
4676 
4677  if (!this->emitCall(Func, 0, LambdaCallOp))
4678  return false;
4679 
4680  this->emitCleanup();
4681  if (ReturnType)
4682  return this->emitRet(*ReturnType, MD);
4683 
4684  // Nothing to do, since we emitted the RVO pointer above.
4685  return this->emitRetVoid(MD);
4686 }
4687 
4688 template <class Emitter>
4689 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitFunc(const FunctionDecl *F) {
4690  // Classify the return type.
4691  ReturnType = this->classify(F->getReturnType());
4692 
4693  auto emitFieldInitializer = [&](const Record::Field *F, unsigned FieldOffset,
4694  const Expr *InitExpr) -> bool {
4695  // We don't know what to do with these, so just return false.
4696  if (InitExpr->getType().isNull())
4697  return false;
4698 
4699  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = this->classify(InitExpr)) {
4700  if (!this->visit(InitExpr))
4701  return false;
4702 
4703  if (F->isBitField())
4704  return this->emitInitThisBitField(*T, F, FieldOffset, InitExpr);
4705  return this->emitInitThisField(*T, FieldOffset, InitExpr);
4706  }
4707  // Non-primitive case. Get a pointer to the field-to-initialize
4708  // on the stack and call visitInitialzer() for it.
4709  InitLinkScope<Emitter> FieldScope(this, InitLink::Field(F->Offset));
4710  if (!this->emitGetPtrThisField(FieldOffset, InitExpr))
4711  return false;
4712 
4713  if (!this->visitInitializer(InitExpr))
4714  return false;
4715 
4716  return this->emitPopPtr(InitExpr);
4717  };
4718 
4719  // Emit custom code if this is a lambda static invoker.
4720  if (const auto *MD = dyn_cast<CXXMethodDecl>(F);
4721  MD && MD->isLambdaStaticInvoker())
4722  return this->emitLambdaStaticInvokerBody(MD);
4723 
4724  // Constructor. Set up field initializers.
4725  if (const auto *Ctor = dyn_cast<CXXConstructorDecl>(F)) {
4726  const RecordDecl *RD = Ctor->getParent();
4727  const Record *R = this->getRecord(RD);
4728  if (!R)
4729  return false;
4730 
4731  InitLinkScope<Emitter> InitScope(this, InitLink::This());
4732  for (const auto *Init : Ctor->inits()) {
4733  // Scope needed for the initializers.
4734  BlockScope<Emitter> Scope(this);
4735 
4736  const Expr *InitExpr = Init->getInit();
4737  if (const FieldDecl *Member = Init->getMember()) {
4738  const Record::Field *F = R->getField(Member);
4739 
4740  if (!emitFieldInitializer(F, F->Offset, InitExpr))
4741  return false;
4742  } else if (const Type *Base = Init->getBaseClass()) {
4743  const auto *BaseDecl = Base->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
4744  assert(BaseDecl);
4745 
4746  if (Init->isBaseVirtual()) {
4747  assert(R->getVirtualBase(BaseDecl));
4748  if (!this->emitGetPtrThisVirtBase(BaseDecl, InitExpr))
4749  return false;
4750 
4751  } else {
4752  // Base class initializer.
4753  // Get This Base and call initializer on it.
4754  const Record::Base *B = R->getBase(BaseDecl);
4755  assert(B);
4756  if (!this->emitGetPtrThisBase(B->Offset, InitExpr))
4757  return false;
4758  }
4759 
4760  if (!this->visitInitializer(InitExpr))
4761  return false;
4762  if (!this->emitFinishInitPop(InitExpr))
4763  return false;
4764  } else if (const IndirectFieldDecl *IFD = Init->getIndirectMember()) {
4765  assert(IFD->getChainingSize() >= 2);
4766 
4767  unsigned NestedFieldOffset = 0;
4768  const Record::Field *NestedField = nullptr;
4769  for (const NamedDecl *ND : IFD->chain()) {
4770  const auto *FD = cast<FieldDecl>(ND);
4771  const Record *FieldRecord =
4772  this->P.getOrCreateRecord(FD->getParent());
4773  assert(FieldRecord);
4774 
4775  NestedField = FieldRecord->getField(FD);
4776  assert(NestedField);
4777 
4778  NestedFieldOffset += NestedField->Offset;
4779  }
4780  assert(NestedField);
4781 
4782  if (!emitFieldInitializer(NestedField, NestedFieldOffset, InitExpr))
4783  return false;
4784  } else {
4785  assert(Init->isDelegatingInitializer());
4786  if (!this->emitThis(InitExpr))
4787  return false;
4788  if (!this->visitInitializer(Init->getInit()))
4789  return false;
4790  if (!this->emitPopPtr(InitExpr))
4791  return false;
4792  }
4793 
4794  if (!Scope.destroyLocals())
4795  return false;
4796  }
4797  }
4798 
4799  if (const auto *Body = F->getBody())
4800  if (!visitStmt(Body))
4801  return false;
4802 
4803  // Emit a guard return to protect against a code path missing one.
4804  if (F->getReturnType()->isVoidType())
4805  return this->emitRetVoid(SourceInfo{});
4806  return this->emitNoRet(SourceInfo{});
4807 }
4808 
4809 template <class Emitter>
4810 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitUnaryOperator(const UnaryOperator *E) {
4811  const Expr *SubExpr = E->getSubExpr();
4812  if (SubExpr->getType()->isAnyComplexType())
4813  return this->VisitComplexUnaryOperator(E);
4814  std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(SubExpr->getType());
4815 
4816  switch (E->getOpcode()) {
4817  case UO_PostInc: { // x++
4818  if (!Ctx.getLangOpts().CPlusPlus14)
4819  return this->emitInvalid(E);
4820  if (!T)
4821  return this->emitError(E);
4822 
4823  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
4824  return false;
4825 
4826  if (T == PT_Ptr || T == PT_FnPtr) {
4827  if (!this->emitIncPtr(E))
4828  return false;
4829 
4830  return DiscardResult ? this->emitPopPtr(E) : true;
4831  }
4832 
4833  if (T == PT_Float) {
4834  return DiscardResult ? this->emitIncfPop(getRoundingMode(E), E)
4835  : this->emitIncf(getRoundingMode(E), E);
4836  }
4837 
4838  return DiscardResult ? this->emitIncPop(*T, E) : this->emitInc(*T, E);
4839  }
4840  case UO_PostDec: { // x--
4841  if (!Ctx.getLangOpts().CPlusPlus14)
4842  return this->emitInvalid(E);
4843  if (!T)
4844  return this->emitError(E);
4845 
4846  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
4847  return false;
4848 
4849  if (T == PT_Ptr || T == PT_FnPtr) {
4850  if (!this->emitDecPtr(E))
4851  return false;
4852 
4853  return DiscardResult ? this->emitPopPtr(E) : true;
4854  }
4855 
4856  if (T == PT_Float) {
4857  return DiscardResult ? this->emitDecfPop(getRoundingMode(E), E)
4858  : this->emitDecf(getRoundingMode(E), E);
4859  }
4860 
4861  return DiscardResult ? this->emitDecPop(*T, E) : this->emitDec(*T, E);
4862  }
4863  case UO_PreInc: { // ++x
4864  if (!Ctx.getLangOpts().CPlusPlus14)
4865  return this->emitInvalid(E);
4866  if (!T)
4867  return this->emitError(E);
4868 
4869  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
4870  return false;
4871 
4872  if (T == PT_Ptr || T == PT_FnPtr) {
4873  if (!this->emitLoadPtr(E))
4874  return false;
4875  if (!this->emitConstUint8(1, E))
4876  return false;
4877  if (!this->emitAddOffsetUint8(E))
4878  return false;
4879  return DiscardResult ? this->emitStorePopPtr(E) : this->emitStorePtr(E);
4880  }
4881 
4882  // Post-inc and pre-inc are the same if the value is to be discarded.
4883  if (DiscardResult) {
4884  if (T == PT_Float)
4885  return this->emitIncfPop(getRoundingMode(E), E);
4886  return this->emitIncPop(*T, E);
4887  }
4888 
4889  if (T == PT_Float) {
4890  const auto &TargetSemantics = Ctx.getFloatSemantics(E->getType());
4891  if (!this->emitLoadFloat(E))
4892  return false;
4893  if (!this->emitConstFloat(llvm::APFloat(TargetSemantics, 1), E))
4894  return false;
4895  if (!this->emitAddf(getRoundingMode(E), E))
4896  return false;
4897  if (!this->emitStoreFloat(E))
4898  return false;
4899  } else {
4900  assert(isIntegralType(*T));
4901  if (!this->emitLoad(*T, E))
4902  return false;
4903  if (!this->emitConst(1, E))
4904  return false;
4905  if (!this->emitAdd(*T, E))
4906  return false;
4907  if (!this->emitStore(*T, E))
4908  return false;
4909  }
4910  return E->isGLValue() || this->emitLoadPop(*T, E);
4911  }
4912  case UO_PreDec: { // --x
4913  if (!Ctx.getLangOpts().CPlusPlus14)
4914  return this->emitInvalid(E);
4915  if (!T)
4916  return this->emitError(E);
4917 
4918  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
4919  return false;
4920 
4921  if (T == PT_Ptr || T == PT_FnPtr) {
4922  if (!this->emitLoadPtr(E))
4923  return false;
4924  if (!this->emitConstUint8(1, E))
4925  return false;
4926  if (!this->emitSubOffsetUint8(E))
4927  return false;
4928  return DiscardResult ? this->emitStorePopPtr(E) : this->emitStorePtr(E);
4929  }
4930 
4931  // Post-dec and pre-dec are the same if the value is to be discarded.
4932  if (DiscardResult) {
4933  if (T == PT_Float)
4934  return this->emitDecfPop(getRoundingMode(E), E);
4935  return this->emitDecPop(*T, E);
4936  }
4937 
4938  if (T == PT_Float) {
4939  const auto &TargetSemantics = Ctx.getFloatSemantics(E->getType());
4940  if (!this->emitLoadFloat(E))
4941  return false;
4942  if (!this->emitConstFloat(llvm::APFloat(TargetSemantics, 1), E))
4943  return false;
4944  if (!this->emitSubf(getRoundingMode(E), E))
4945  return false;
4946  if (!this->emitStoreFloat(E))
4947  return false;
4948  } else {
4949  assert(isIntegralType(*T));
4950  if (!this->emitLoad(*T, E))
4951  return false;
4952  if (!this->emitConst(1, E))
4953  return false;
4954  if (!this->emitSub(*T, E))
4955  return false;
4956  if (!this->emitStore(*T, E))
4957  return false;
4958  }
4959  return E->isGLValue() || this->emitLoadPop(*T, E);
4960  }
4961  case UO_LNot: // !x
4962  if (!T)
4963  return this->emitError(E);
4964 
4965  if (DiscardResult)
4966  return this->discard(SubExpr);
4967 
4968  if (!this->visitBool(SubExpr))
4969  return false;
4970 
4971  if (!this->emitInvBool(E))
4972  return false;
4973 
4974  if (PrimType ET = classifyPrim(E->getType()); ET != PT_Bool)
4975  return this->emitCast(PT_Bool, ET, E);
4976  return true;
4977  case UO_Minus: // -x
4978  if (!T)
4979  return this->emitError(E);
4980 
4981  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
4982  return false;
4983  return DiscardResult ? this->emitPop(*T, E) : this->emitNeg(*T, E);
4984  case UO_Plus: // +x
4985  if (!T)
4986  return this->emitError(E);
4987 
4988  if (!this->visit(SubExpr)) // noop
4989  return false;
4990  return DiscardResult ? this->emitPop(*T, E) : true;
4991  case UO_AddrOf: // &x
4992  if (E->getType()->isMemberPointerType()) {
4993  // C++11 [expr.unary.op]p3 has very strict rules on how the address of a
4994  // member can be formed.
4995  return this->emitGetMemberPtr(cast<DeclRefExpr>(SubExpr)->getDecl(), E);
4996  }
4997  // We should already have a pointer when we get here.
4998  return this->delegate(SubExpr);
4999  case UO_Deref: // *x
5000  if (DiscardResult)
5001  return this->discard(SubExpr);
5002  return this->visit(SubExpr);
5003  case UO_Not: // ~x
5004  if (!T)
5005  return this->emitError(E);
5006 
5007  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
5008  return false;
5009  return DiscardResult ? this->emitPop(*T, E) : this->emitComp(*T, E);
5010  case UO_Real: // __real x
5011  assert(T);
5012  return this->delegate(SubExpr);
5013  case UO_Imag: { // __imag x
5014  assert(T);
5015  if (!this->discard(SubExpr))
5016  return false;
5017  return this->visitZeroInitializer(*T, SubExpr->getType(), SubExpr);
5018  }
5019  case UO_Extension:
5020  return this->delegate(SubExpr);
5021  case UO_Coawait:
5022  assert(false && "Unhandled opcode");
5023  }
5024 
5025  return false;
5026 }
5027 
5028 template <class Emitter>
5029 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitComplexUnaryOperator(const UnaryOperator *E) {
5030  const Expr *SubExpr = E->getSubExpr();
5031  assert(SubExpr->getType()->isAnyComplexType());
5032 
5033  if (DiscardResult)
5034  return this->discard(SubExpr);
5035 
5036  std::optional<PrimType> ResT = classify(E);
5037  auto prepareResult = [=]() -> bool {
5038  if (!ResT && !Initializing) {
5039  std::optional<unsigned> LocalIndex = allocateLocal(SubExpr);
5040  if (!LocalIndex)
5041  return false;
5042  return this->emitGetPtrLocal(*LocalIndex, E);
5043  }
5044 
5045  return true;
5046  };
5047 
5048  // The offset of the temporary, if we created one.
5049  unsigned SubExprOffset = ~0u;
5050  auto createTemp = [=, &SubExprOffset]() -> bool {
5051  SubExprOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(SubExpr, PT_Ptr, true, false);
5052  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
5053  return false;
5054  return this->emitSetLocal(PT_Ptr, SubExprOffset, E);
5055  };
5056 
5057  PrimType ElemT = classifyComplexElementType(SubExpr->getType());
5058  auto getElem = [=](unsigned Offset, unsigned Index) -> bool {
5059  if (!this->emitGetLocal(PT_Ptr, Offset, E))
5060  return false;
5061  return this->emitArrayElemPop(ElemT, Index, E);
5062  };
5063 
5064  switch (E->getOpcode()) {
5065  case UO_Minus:
5066  if (!prepareResult())
5067  return false;
5068  if (!createTemp())
5069  return false;
5070  for (unsigned I = 0; I != 2; ++I) {
5071  if (!getElem(SubExprOffset, I))
5072  return false;
5073  if (!this->emitNeg(ElemT, E))
