5074  return false;
5075  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, I, E))
5076  return false;
5077  }
5078  break;
5079 
5080  case UO_Plus: // +x
5081  case UO_AddrOf: // &x
5082  case UO_Deref: // *x
5083  return this->delegate(SubExpr);
5084 
5085  case UO_LNot:
5086  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
5087  return false;
5088  if (!this->emitComplexBoolCast(SubExpr))
5089  return false;
5090  if (!this->emitInvBool(E))
5091  return false;
5092  if (PrimType ET = classifyPrim(E->getType()); ET != PT_Bool)
5093  return this->emitCast(PT_Bool, ET, E);
5094  return true;
5095 
5096  case UO_Real:
5097  return this->emitComplexReal(SubExpr);
5098 
5099  case UO_Imag:
5100  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
5101  return false;
5102 
5103  if (SubExpr->isLValue()) {
5104  if (!this->emitConstUint8(1, E))
5105  return false;
5106  return this->emitArrayElemPtrPopUint8(E);
5107  }
5108 
5109  // Since our _Complex implementation does not map to a primitive type,
5110  // we sometimes have to do the lvalue-to-rvalue conversion here manually.
5111  return this->emitArrayElemPop(classifyPrim(E->getType()), 1, E);
5112 
5113  case UO_Not: // ~x
5114  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
5115  return false;
5116  // Negate the imaginary component.
5117  if (!this->emitArrayElem(ElemT, 1, E))
5118  return false;
5119  if (!this->emitNeg(ElemT, E))
5120  return false;
5121  if (!this->emitInitElem(ElemT, 1, E))
5122  return false;
5123  return DiscardResult ? this->emitPopPtr(E) : true;
5124 
5125  case UO_Extension:
5126  return this->delegate(SubExpr);
5127 
5128  default:
5129  return this->emitInvalid(E);
5130  }
5131 
5132  return true;
5133 }
5134 
5135 template <class Emitter>
5136 bool Compiler<Emitter>::visitDeclRef(const ValueDecl *D, const Expr *E) {
5137  if (DiscardResult)
5138  return true;
5139 
5140  if (const auto *ECD = dyn_cast<EnumConstantDecl>(D)) {
5141  return this->emitConst(ECD->getInitVal(), E);
5142  } else if (const auto *BD = dyn_cast<BindingDecl>(D)) {
5143  return this->visit(BD->getBinding());
5144  } else if (const auto *FuncDecl = dyn_cast<FunctionDecl>(D)) {
5145  const Function *F = getFunction(FuncDecl);
5146  return F && this->emitGetFnPtr(F, E);
5147  } else if (const auto *TPOD = dyn_cast<TemplateParamObjectDecl>(D)) {
5148  if (std::optional<unsigned> Index = P.getOrCreateGlobal(D)) {
5149  if (!this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*Index, E))
5150  return false;
5151  if (std::optional<PrimType> T = classify(E->getType())) {
5152  if (!this->visitAPValue(TPOD->getValue(), *T, E))
5153  return false;
5154  return this->emitInitGlobal(*T, *Index, E);
5155  }
5156  return this->visitAPValueInitializer(TPOD->getValue(), E);
5157  }
5158  return false;
5159  }
5160 
5161  // References are implemented via pointers, so when we see a DeclRefExpr
5162  // pointing to a reference, we need to get its value directly (i.e. the
5163  // pointer to the actual value) instead of a pointer to the pointer to the
5164  // value.
5165  bool IsReference = D->getType()->isReferenceType();
5166 
5167  // Check for local/global variables and parameters.
5168  if (auto It = Locals.find(D); It != Locals.end()) {
5169  const unsigned Offset = It->second.Offset;
5170  if (IsReference)
5171  return this->emitGetLocal(PT_Ptr, Offset, E);
5172  return this->emitGetPtrLocal(Offset, E);
5173  } else if (auto GlobalIndex = P.getGlobal(D)) {
5174  if (IsReference) {
5175  if (!Ctx.getLangOpts().CPlusPlus11)
5176  return this->emitGetGlobal(classifyPrim(E), *GlobalIndex, E);
5177  return this->emitGetGlobalUnchecked(classifyPrim(E), *GlobalIndex, E);
5178  }
5179 
5180  return this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*GlobalIndex, E);
5181  } else if (const auto *PVD = dyn_cast<ParmVarDecl>(D)) {
5182  if (auto It = this->Params.find(PVD); It != this->Params.end()) {
5183  if (IsReference || !It->second.IsPtr)
5184  return this->emitGetParam(classifyPrim(E), It->second.Offset, E);
5185 
5186  return this->emitGetPtrParam(It->second.Offset, E);
5187  }
5188  }
5189 
5190  // In case we need to re-visit a declaration.
5191  auto revisit = [&](const VarDecl *VD) -> bool {
5192  auto VarState = this->visitDecl(VD);
5193 
5194  if (VarState.notCreated())
5195  return true;
5196  if (!VarState)
5197  return false;
5198  // Retry.
5199  return this->visitDeclRef(D, E);
5200  };
5201 
5202  // Handle lambda captures.
5203  if (auto It = this->LambdaCaptures.find(D);
5204  It != this->LambdaCaptures.end()) {
5205  auto [Offset, IsPtr] = It->second;
5206 
5207  if (IsPtr)
5208  return this->emitGetThisFieldPtr(Offset, E);
5209  return this->emitGetPtrThisField(Offset, E);
5210  } else if (const auto *DRE = dyn_cast<DeclRefExpr>(E);
5211  DRE && DRE->refersToEnclosingVariableOrCapture()) {
5212  if (const auto *VD = dyn_cast<VarDecl>(D); VD && VD->isInitCapture())
5213  return revisit(VD);
5214  }
5215 
5216  if (D != InitializingDecl) {
5217  // Try to lazily visit (or emit dummy pointers for) declarations
5218  // we haven't seen yet.
5219  if (Ctx.getLangOpts().CPlusPlus) {
5220  if (const auto *VD = dyn_cast<VarDecl>(D)) {
5221  const auto typeShouldBeVisited = [&](QualType T) -> bool {
5222  if (T.isConstant(Ctx.getASTContext()))
5223  return true;
5224  if (const auto *RT = T->getAs<ReferenceType>())
5225  return RT->getPointeeType().isConstQualified();
5226  return false;
5227  };
5228 
5229  // Visit local const variables like normal.
5230  if ((VD->hasGlobalStorage() || VD->isLocalVarDecl() ||
5231  VD->isStaticDataMember()) &&
5232  typeShouldBeVisited(VD->getType()))
5233  return revisit(VD);
5234  }
5235  } else {
5236  if (const auto *VD = dyn_cast<VarDecl>(D);
5237  VD && VD->getAnyInitializer() &&
5238  VD->getType().isConstant(Ctx.getASTContext()) && !VD->isWeak())
5239  return revisit(VD);
5240  }
5241  }
5242 
5243  if (std::optional<unsigned> I = P.getOrCreateDummy(D)) {
5244  if (!this->emitGetPtrGlobal(*I, E))
5245  return false;
5246  if (E->getType()->isVoidType())
5247  return true;
5248  // Convert the dummy pointer to another pointer type if we have to.
5249  if (PrimType PT = classifyPrim(E); PT != PT_Ptr) {
5250  if (isPtrType(PT))
5251  return this->emitDecayPtr(PT_Ptr, PT, E);
5252  return false;
5253  }
5254  return true;
5255  }
5256 
5257  if (const auto *DRE = dyn_cast<DeclRefExpr>(E))
5258  return this->emitInvalidDeclRef(DRE, E);
5259  return false;
5260 }
5261 
5262 template <class Emitter>
5263 bool Compiler<Emitter>::VisitDeclRefExpr(const DeclRefExpr *E) {
5264  const auto *D = E->getDecl();
5265  return this->visitDeclRef(D, E);
5266 }
5267 
5268 template <class Emitter> void Compiler<Emitter>::emitCleanup() {
5269  for (VariableScope<Emitter> *C = VarScope; C; C = C->getParent())
5270  C->emitDestruction();
5271 }
5272 
5273 template <class Emitter>
5274 unsigned Compiler<Emitter>::collectBaseOffset(const QualType BaseType,
5275  const QualType DerivedType) {
5276  const auto extractRecordDecl = [](QualType Ty) -> const CXXRecordDecl * {
5277  if (const auto *PT = dyn_cast<PointerType>(Ty))
5278  return PT->getPointeeType()->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
5279  return Ty->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
5280  };
5281  const CXXRecordDecl *BaseDecl = extractRecordDecl(BaseType);
5282  const CXXRecordDecl *DerivedDecl = extractRecordDecl(DerivedType);
5283 
5284  return Ctx.collectBaseOffset(BaseDecl, DerivedDecl);
5285 }
5286 
5287 /// Emit casts from a PrimType to another PrimType.
5288 template <class Emitter>
5289 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitPrimCast(PrimType FromT, PrimType ToT,
5290  QualType ToQT, const Expr *E) {
5291 
5292  if (FromT == PT_Float) {
5293  // Floating to floating.
5294  if (ToT == PT_Float) {
5295  const llvm::fltSemantics *ToSem = &Ctx.getFloatSemantics(ToQT);
5296  return this->emitCastFP(ToSem, getRoundingMode(E), E);
5297  }
5298 
5299  if (ToT == PT_IntAP)
5300  return this->emitCastFloatingIntegralAP(Ctx.getBitWidth(ToQT), E);
5301  if (ToT == PT_IntAPS)
5302  return this->emitCastFloatingIntegralAPS(Ctx.getBitWidth(ToQT), E);
5303 
5304  // Float to integral.
5305  if (isIntegralType(ToT) || ToT == PT_Bool)
5306  return this->emitCastFloatingIntegral(ToT, E);
5307  }
5308 
5309  if (isIntegralType(FromT) || FromT == PT_Bool) {
5310  if (ToT == PT_IntAP)
5311  return this->emitCastAP(FromT, Ctx.getBitWidth(ToQT), E);
5312  if (ToT == PT_IntAPS)
5313  return this->emitCastAPS(FromT, Ctx.getBitWidth(ToQT), E);
5314 
5315  // Integral to integral.
5316  if (isIntegralType(ToT) || ToT == PT_Bool)
5317  return FromT != ToT ? this->emitCast(FromT, ToT, E) : true;
5318 
5319  if (ToT == PT_Float) {
5320  // Integral to floating.
5321  const llvm::fltSemantics *ToSem = &Ctx.getFloatSemantics(ToQT);
5322  return this->emitCastIntegralFloating(FromT, ToSem, getRoundingMode(E),
5323  E);
5324  }
5325  }
5326 
5327  return false;
5328 }
5329 
5330 /// Emits __real(SubExpr)
5331 template <class Emitter>
5332 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitComplexReal(const Expr *SubExpr) {
5333  assert(SubExpr->getType()->isAnyComplexType());
5334 
5335  if (DiscardResult)
5336  return this->discard(SubExpr);
5337 
5338  if (!this->visit(SubExpr))
5339  return false;
5340  if (SubExpr->isLValue()) {
5341  if (!this->emitConstUint8(0, SubExpr))
5342  return false;
5343  return this->emitArrayElemPtrPopUint8(SubExpr);
5344  }
5345 
5346  // Rvalue, load the actual element.
5347  return this->emitArrayElemPop(classifyComplexElementType(SubExpr->getType()),
5348  0, SubExpr);
5349 }
5350 
5351 template <class Emitter>
5352 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitComplexBoolCast(const Expr *E) {
5353  assert(!DiscardResult);
5354  PrimType ElemT = classifyComplexElementType(E->getType());
5355  // We emit the expression (__real(E) != 0 || __imag(E) != 0)
5356  // for us, that means (bool)E[0] || (bool)E[1]
5357  if (!this->emitArrayElem(ElemT, 0, E))
5358  return false;
5359  if (ElemT == PT_Float) {
5360  if (!this->emitCastFloatingIntegral(PT_Bool, E))
5361  return false;
5362  } else {
5363  if (!this->emitCast(ElemT, PT_Bool, E))
5364  return false;
5365  }
5366 
5367  // We now have the bool value of E[0] on the stack.
5368  LabelTy LabelTrue = this->getLabel();
5369  if (!this->jumpTrue(LabelTrue))
5370  return false;
5371 
5372  if (!this->emitArrayElemPop(ElemT, 1, E))
5373  return false;
5374  if (ElemT == PT_Float) {
5375  if (!this->emitCastFloatingIntegral(PT_Bool, E))
5376  return false;
5377  } else {
5378  if (!this->emitCast(ElemT, PT_Bool, E))
5379  return false;
5380  }
5381  // Leave the boolean value of E[1] on the stack.
5382  LabelTy EndLabel = this->getLabel();
5383  this->jump(EndLabel);
5384 
5385  this->emitLabel(LabelTrue);
5386  if (!this->emitPopPtr(E))
5387  return false;
5388  if (!this->emitConstBool(true, E))
5389  return false;
5390 
5391  this->fallthrough(EndLabel);
5392  this->emitLabel(EndLabel);
5393 
5394  return true;
5395 }
5396 
5397 template <class Emitter>
5398 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitComplexComparison(const Expr *LHS, const Expr *RHS,
5399  const BinaryOperator *E) {
5400  assert(E->isComparisonOp());
5401  assert(!Initializing);
5402  assert(!DiscardResult);
5403 
5404  PrimType ElemT;
5405  bool LHSIsComplex;
5406  unsigned LHSOffset;
5407  if (LHS->getType()->isAnyComplexType()) {
5408  LHSIsComplex = true;
5409  ElemT = classifyComplexElementType(LHS->getType());
5410  LHSOffset = allocateLocalPrimitive(LHS, PT_Ptr, /*IsConst=*/true,
5411  /*IsExtended=*/false);
5412  if (!this->visit(LHS))
5413  return false;
5414  if (!this->emitSetLocal(PT_Ptr, LHSOffset, E))
5415  return false;
5416  } else {
5417  LHSIsComplex = false;
5418  PrimType LHST = classifyPrim(LHS->getType());
5419  LHSOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(LHS, LHST, true, false);
5420  if (!this->visit(LHS))
5421  return false;
5422  if (!this->emitSetLocal(LHST, LHSOffset, E))
5423  return false;
5424  }
5425 
5426  bool RHSIsComplex;
5427  unsigned RHSOffset;
5428  if (RHS->getType()->isAnyComplexType()) {
5429  RHSIsComplex = true;
5430  ElemT = classifyComplexElementType(RHS->getType());
5431  RHSOffset = allocateLocalPrimitive(RHS, PT_Ptr, /*IsConst=*/true,
5432  /*IsExtended=*/false);
5433  if (!this->visit(RHS))
5434  return false;
5435  if (!this->emitSetLocal(PT_Ptr, RHSOffset, E))
5436  return false;
5437  } else {
5438  RHSIsComplex = false;
5439  PrimType RHST = classifyPrim(RHS->getType());
5440  RHSOffset = this->allocateLocalPrimitive(RHS, RHST, true, false);
5441  if (!this->visit(RHS))
5442  return false;
5443  if (!this->emitSetLocal(RHST, RHSOffset, E))
5444  return false;
5445  }
5446 
5447  auto getElem = [&](unsigned LocalOffset, unsigned Index,
5448  bool IsComplex) -> bool {
5449  if (IsComplex) {
5450  if (!this->emitGetLocal(PT_Ptr, LocalOffset, E))
5451  return false;
5452  return this->emitArrayElemPop(ElemT, Index, E);
5453  }
5454  return this->emitGetLocal(ElemT, LocalOffset, E);
5455  };
5456 
5457  for (unsigned I = 0; I != 2; ++I) {
5458  // Get both values.
5459  if (!getElem(LHSOffset, I, LHSIsComplex))
5460  return false;
5461  if (!getElem(RHSOffset, I, RHSIsComplex))
5462  return false;
5463  // And compare them.
5464  if (!this->emitEQ(ElemT, E))
5465  return false;
5466 
5467  if (!this->emitCastBoolUint8(E))
5468  return false;
5469  }
5470 
5471  // We now have two bool values on the stack. Compare those.
5472  if (!this->emitAddUint8(E))
5473  return false;
5474  if (!this->emitConstUint8(2, E))
5475  return false;
5476 
5477  if (E->getOpcode() == BO_EQ) {
5478  if (!this->emitEQUint8(E))
5479  return false;
5480  } else if (E->getOpcode() == BO_NE) {
5481  if (!this->emitNEUint8(E))
5482  return false;
5483  } else
5484  return false;
5485 
5486  // In C, this returns an int.
5487  if (PrimType ResT = classifyPrim(E->getType()); ResT != PT_Bool)
5488  return this->emitCast(PT_Bool, ResT, E);
5489  return true;
5490 }
5491 
5492 /// When calling this, we have a pointer of the local-to-destroy
5493 /// on the stack.
5494 /// Emit destruction of record types (or arrays of record types).
5495 template <class Emitter>
5496 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitRecordDestruction(const Record *R) {
5497  assert(R);
5498  // First, destroy all fields.
5499  for (const Record::Field &Field : llvm::reverse(R->fields())) {
5500  const Descriptor *D = Field.Desc;
5501  if (!D->isPrimitive() && !D->isPrimitiveArray()) {
5502  if (!this->emitGetPtrField(Field.Offset, SourceInfo{}))
5503  return false;
5504  if (!this->emitDestruction(D))
5505  return false;
5506  if (!this->emitPopPtr(SourceInfo{}))
5507  return false;
5508  }
5509  }
5510 
5511  // FIXME: Unions need to be handled differently here. We don't want to
5512  // call the destructor of its members.
5513 
5514  // Now emit the destructor and recurse into base classes.
5515  if (const CXXDestructorDecl *Dtor = R->getDestructor();
5516  Dtor && !Dtor->isTrivial()) {
5517  const Function *DtorFunc = getFunction(Dtor);
5518  if (!DtorFunc)
5519  return false;
5520  assert(DtorFunc->hasThisPointer());
5521  assert(DtorFunc->getNumParams() == 1);
5522  if (!this->emitDupPtr(SourceInfo{}))
5523  return false;
5524  if (!this->emitCall(DtorFunc, 0, SourceInfo{}))
5525  return false;
5526  }
5527 
5528  for (const Record::Base &Base : llvm::reverse(R->bases())) {
5529  if (!this->emitGetPtrBase(Base.Offset, SourceInfo{}))
5530  return false;
5531  if (!this->emitRecordDestruction(Base.R))
5532  return false;
5533  if (!this->emitPopPtr(SourceInfo{}))
5534  return false;
5535  }
5536 
5537  // FIXME: Virtual bases.
5538  return true;
5539 }
5540 /// When calling this, we have a pointer of the local-to-destroy
5541 /// on the stack.
5542 /// Emit destruction of record types (or arrays of record types).
5543 template <class Emitter>
5544 bool Compiler<Emitter>::emitDestruction(const Descriptor *Desc) {
5545  assert(Desc);
5546  assert(!Desc->isPrimitive());
5547  assert(!Desc->isPrimitiveArray());
5548 
5549  // Arrays.
5550  if (Desc->isArray()) {
5551  const Descriptor *ElemDesc = Desc->ElemDesc;
5552  assert(ElemDesc);
5553 
5554  // Don't need to do anything for these.
5555  if (ElemDesc->isPrimitiveArray())
5556  return true;
5557 
5558  // If this is an array of record types, check if we need
5559  // to call the element destructors at all. If not, try
5560  // to save the work.
5561  if (const Record *ElemRecord = ElemDesc->ElemRecord) {
5562  if (const CXXDestructorDecl *Dtor = ElemRecord->getDestructor();
5563  !Dtor || Dtor->isTrivial())
5564  return true;
5565  }
5566 
5567  for (ssize_t I = Desc->getNumElems() - 1; I >= 0; --I) {
5568  if (!this->emitConstUint64(I, SourceInfo{}))
5569  return false;
5570  if (!this->emitArrayElemPtrUint64(SourceInfo{}))
5571  return false;
5572  if (!this->emitDestruction(ElemDesc))
5573  return false;
5574  if (!this->emitPopPtr(SourceInfo{}))
5575  return false;
5576  }
5577  return true;
5578  }
5579 
5580  assert(Desc->ElemRecord);
5581  return this->emitRecordDestruction(Desc->ElemRecord);
5582 }
5583
